item.name: Drow Chain Mail
entries: You are considered proficient with this armor even if you lack proficiency with medium armor. While you wear this black chain mail armor, you have advantage on stealth checks as long you are not in bright light. Once per day, when wearing this armor, you can cast {@spell darkness|PHB}.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Grosso is a 10th-level spellcaster. His spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save {@dc 14}, {@hit 6} to hit with spell attacks). He can cast the  following spells:

trait.name: Abyssal Blessing of Orcus
entries: Abbot Grosso gains 15 temporary hit points when he reduces a hostile creature that is not undead to 0 hit points.

trait.name: Unholy Strike
entries: Once on each of Grosso's turns when he hits a creature with a weapon attack, he can cause the attack to deal an extra 13 ({@damage 3d8}) necrotic damage to the target.

action.name: +2 Sickle
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 2d4 + 2}) slashing damage.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The acolyte of Orcus is a 3rd-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save {@dc 12}, {@hit 4} to hit with spell attacks). It has the following cleric spells prepared:

trait.name: Abyssal Blessing of Orcus
entries: The acolyte of Orcus gains 5 temporary hit points when it reduces a hostile creature that is not undead to 0 hit points.

trait.name: Darksight
entries: Initiates of Orcus are gifted with darkvision.

trait.name: Unholy Strike
entries: Once on each of the acolyte's turns when it hits a creature with a weapon attack, the acolyte can cause the attack to deal an extra 4 ({@damage 1d8}) necrotic damage to the target.

action.name: Warhammer
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 3} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d8 + 1}) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Light Crossbow
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 2} to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d8}) piercing damage.

action.name: Caress of Orcus (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 3} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}3 ({@damage 1d4 + 1}) necrotic damage, and the target's Strength score is reduced by {@dice 1d3}. The target dies if this reduces its Strength to 0. Otherwise, the reduction lasts until the  target finishes a short or long rest. If a non-evil humanoid dies from this attack, a shadow rises from the corpse in 24 hours under the acolyte's control, unless the humanoid is restored to life or its body is destroyed. The acolyte can have no more than two shadows under its control at one time.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The acolyte of Tsathogga is a 3rd-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save {@dc 12}, {@hit 4} to hit with spell attacks). It has the following cleric spells prepared:

trait.name: Breath of the Swamp
entries: The blessed of Tsathogga can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Fetid Shroud of the Frog God
entries: The acolyte of Tsathogga is surrounded by a fetid, swirling shroud of foul corruption. At the start of each of the acolyte's turns, each creature within 5 feet of it takes 7 ({@damage 2d6}) acid damage. A creature that touches the acolyte or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 7 ({@damage 2d6}) acid damage.

trait.name: Fetid Strike
entries: Once on each of the acolyte's turns when it hits a creature with a weapon attack, the acolyte can cause the attack to deal an extra 4 ({@damage 1d8}) acid damage to the target.

action.name: Sickle
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 3} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}3 ({@damage 1d4 + 1}) slashing damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) acid damage.

action.name: Light Crossbow
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 2} to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d8}) piercing damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) acid damage.

action.name: Plague of Frogs (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: The acolyte magically calls {@dice 1d4} giant frogs, provided that the acolyte is within 100 feet of a body of water large enough to cover a Medium creature (GM discretion). The called creatures arrive within {@dice 1d4} rounds, acting as allies of the acolyte, and obeying its spoken commands. The beasts remain for 1 hour, until the acolyte dies, or until the acolyte dismisses them as a bonus action.

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries: The aeon's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC21, {@hit 13} to hit with spell attacks). It can cast the following spells without material components.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The aeon is a 20th-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC20, {@hit 12} to hit with spell attacks). It has the following cleric spells prepared.

trait.name: Extension of All
entries: The aeon can never fail an Intelligence check, including ones such as opposed checks while using detect thoughts, as long as it is not inside an {@spell antimagic field|PHB} or is otherwise trapped within a space that blocks divination effects, such as an {@spell imprisonment|PHB} spell.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If the aeon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Void Form
entries: While not incorporeal, the aeon's form is only a semi-tangible manifestation of something greater. Its AC includes its Constitution bonus.

action.name: Energy Touch
entries: {@atk ms} {@hit 13} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}74 ({@damage 15d8 + 7}) radiant or necrotic damage (aeon's choice).

action.name: Sphere of Creation (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: The aeon summons a 2-foot diameter sphere of white energy in an unoccupied space next to it. The sphere remains summoned for 1 minute. As a bonus action, the aeon can move the sphere in any direction up to 15 feet away, out to a maximum range of 300 feet.

Wherever the sphere travels, it warps and bends existing matter, reforming it into new matter. All objects, structures, or creatures that come into contact with the sphere are also transformed. Any creature that touches the sphere or starts its turn within 5 feet of the sphere must succeed on a {@dc 19} Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the creature's body begins to change and reform into random materials, reshaping it, inflicting 45 ({@damage 10d8}) force damage on the creature in the process. The creature must repeat the saving throw at the end of its next turn. On a success, the effect ends. On a failure, the creature is completely transformed. A creature that is transformed dies and can only be returned to normal with a {@spell wish|PHB} spell.

action.name: Sphere of Oblivion (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: The aeon summons a 2-foot-diameter sphere of utter darkness in an unoccupied space within 5 feet of it. The sphere remains summoned for 1 minute. As a bonus action, the aeon can move the sphere in any direction up to 15 feet away, out to a maximum range of 300 feet.

The sphere disintegrates all matter it passes through and all matter then passes through it. Any creature that touches the sphere or starts its turn within 5 feet of the sphere must succeed on a {@dc 19} Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the target takes 85 ({@damage 10d6 + 50}) necrotic damage, or half as much on a success. If this damage reduces the target to 0 hit points, it is disintegrated.

A disintegrated creature and everything it is wearing and carrying, except magic items, are reduced to pile of fine gray dust. The creature can be restored to life only by means of true resurrection or a {@spell wish|PHB} spell.

legendary.name: Cast a spell.
entries: The aeon can cast one spell.

legendary.name: Move Sphere (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: The aeon can move one sphere it has summoned up to 15 feet, up to its maximum range of 300 feet away from the aeon.

legendary.name: Summon Spheres (Costs 3 Actions)
entries: The aeon summons one or both of its unsummoned spheres.

immune.note: from nonmagical weapons not made of adamantine

trait.name: Antimagic Susceptibility
entries: The darkwood desk is {@condition incapacitated|PHB} while in the area of an {@spell antimagic field|PHB}. If targeted by {@spell dispel magic|PHB}, the darkwood desk must succeed on a Constitution saving throw against the caster's spell save DC or fall unconscious for 1 minute.

trait.name: False Appearance
entries: While it remains motionless, the darkwood desk is indistinguishable from what it is built to resemble.

trait.name: Immutable Form
entries: The darkwood desk is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The darkwood desk makes two slam attacks.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 10 ft, one target. {@h}19 ({@damage 3d10 + 3}) bludgeoning damage.

trait.name: Keen Sight
entries: Afrit has advantage on Wisdom ({@skill Perception|PHB}) checks that rely on sight.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: Afrit has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Afrit makes three attacks: one with its beak and two with its talons.

action.name: Beak
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d6 + 6}) piercing damage.

action.name: Talons
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}15 ({@damage 2d8 + 6}) slashing damage.

reaction.name: Parry
entries: The afrit adds 3 to its AC against one melee attack that would hit it. To do so, the afrit must see the attacker and be wielding a melee weapon.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Agamemnon is a 19th-level spellcaster. His spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save {@dc 24}, {@hit 16} to hit with spell attacks). He can cast the following spells:

trait.name: Esoteric Recovery (1/Day)
entries: Agamemnon can regain one spell slot up to 7th level at will.

trait.name: Shapechanger
entries: If Agamemnon isn't in sunlight or running water, he can use his action to polymorph into a Tiny bat or a Medium cloud of mist, or back into his true form.

While in bat form, Agamemnon can't speak, its walking speed is 5 feet, and he has a flying speed of 30 feet. His statistics, other than his size and speed, are unchanged. Anything he is wearing transforms with him, but nothing he is carrying does. He reverts to his true form if he dies.

While in mist form, Agamemnon can't take any actions, speak, or manipulate objects. He is weightless, has a flying speed of 20 feet, can hover, and can enter a hostile creature's space and stop there. In addition, if air can pass through a space, the mist can do so without squeezing, and he can't pass through water. He has advantage on Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution saving throws, and he is immune to all nonmagical damage, except the damage he takes from sunlight.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If Agamemnon fails a saving throw, he can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Misty Escape
entries: When he drops to 0 hit points outside his resting place, Agamemnon transforms into a cloud of mist (as in the Shapechanger trait) instead of falling {@condition unconscious|PHB}, provided that he isn't in sunlight or running water. If he can't transform, he is destroyed.

While he has 0 hit points in mist form, he can't revert to his vampire form, and he must reach his resting place within 2 hours or be destroyed. Once in his resting place, he reverts to his vampire form. He is then {@condition paralyzed|PHB} until he regains at least 1 hit point. After spending 1 hour in his resting place with 0 hit points, he regains 1 hit point.

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: Agamemnon regains 20 hit points at the start of his turn if he has at least 1 hit point and isn't in sunlight or running water. If Agamemnon takes radiant damage or damage from holy water, this trait doesn't function at the start of his next turn.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: Agamemnon can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

trait.name: Vampire Weaknesses
entries: Agamemnon has the following flaws:

items.name: Forbiddance
entries: Agamemnon can't enter a residence without an invitation from one of the occupants.

items.name: Harmed by Running Water
entries: Agamemnon takes 20 acid damage if he ends his turn in running water.

items.name: Stake to the Heart
entries: If a piercing weapon made of wood is driven into Agamemnon's heart while he is {@condition incapacitated|PHB} in his resting place, he is {@condition paralyzed|PHB} until the stake is removed.

items.name: Sunlight Hypersensitivity
entries: Agamemnon takes 20 radiant damage when he starts his turn in sunlight. While in sunlight, he has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.

action.name: Multiattack (Vampire Form Only)
entries: Agamemnon makes two melee attacks, only one of which can be a bite attack.

action.name: Butcher (Vampire Form Only)
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 16} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}19 ({@damage 3d6 + 9}) slashing damage.

action.name: Bite (Bat or Vampire Form Only)
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 12} to hit, reach 5 ft., one willing creature that is {@condition grappled|PHB} by Agamemnon, {@condition incapacitated|PHB}, or {@condition restrained|PHB}. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d6 + 5}) piercing damage plus 14 ({@damage 4d6}) necrotic damage. The target's hit point maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the necrotic damage taken, and Agamemnon regains hit points equal to that amount. The reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its hit point maximum to 0. A humanoid slain in this way and then buried in the ground rises the following night as a {@creature vampire spawn|MM} under Agamemnon's control.

action.name: Charm
entries: Agamemnon targets one humanoid he can see within 30 feet of it. If the target can see Agamemnon, the target must succeed on a {@dc 19} Wisdom saving throw against this magic or be {@condition charmed|PHB} by Agamemnon. The {@condition charmed|PHB} target regards Agamemnon as a trusted friend to be heeded and protected. Although the target isn't under Agamemnon's control, it takes Agamemnon's requests or actions in the most favorable way it can, and it is a willing target for Agamemnon's bite attack. Each time Agamemnon or Agamemnon's companions do anything harmful to the target, it can repeat the saving throw, ending the effect on itself on a success. Otherwise, the effect lasts 24 hours or until Agamemnon is destroyed, is on a different plane of existence than the target or takes a bonus action to end the effect.

action.name: Children of the Night (1/Day)
entries: Agamemnon magically calls {@dice 2d4} swarms of bats or rats, provided that the sun isn't up. While outdoors, Agamemnon can call {@dice 3d6} wolves instead. The called creatures arrive in {@dice 1d4} rounds, acting as allies of Agamemnon and obeying his spoken commands. The beasts remain for 1 hour, until Agamemnon dies, or until Agamemnon dismisses them as a bonus action.

legendary.name: Move
entries: Agamemnon moves up to his speed without provoking opportunity attacks.

legendary.name: Butcher
entries: Agamemnon makes one attack with Butcher.

legendary.name: Bite (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: Agamemnon makes one bite attack.

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries: The agathion's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save {@dc 18}, + {@hit 10} to hit with spell attacks). The agathion can cast the following spells without requiring any material components.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The agathion is a 17th-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save {@dc 20}, {@hit 12} to hit with spell attacks). It has the following cleric spells prepared:

trait.name: Celestial Focus
entries: An agathion's color indicates aspects of its power and attunement to the powers of the good planes. Use the following table to determine the agathion's breath weapon type, the additional damage type of its bite and claw attacks, and additional resistances and immunities.

entries.name: Agathion Colors
rows: 60 ft. line that is 5 feet wide, 12d8 acid damage

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If the agathion fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: An agathion regains 10 hit points at the start of each of its turns. If the agathion takes necrotic damage, this regeneration does not function at the start of the agathion's next turn.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The agathion makes one bite attack and two claw attacks.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 12} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}15 ({@damage 2d8 + 6}) piercing damage, plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) damage of the agathion's color.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 12} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d6 + 6}) slashing damage, plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) damage of the agathion's color.

action.name: Breath Weapon {@recharge 5}
entries: The agathion exhales its devastating breath weapon. Any creatures in the affected area must make {@dc 19} Dexterity saving throws. On a failed save, they take damage based on the agathion's color.

legendary.name: Detect
entries: The agathion makes a Wisdom ({@skill Perception|PHB}) check.

legendary.name: Cast a Cantrip
entries: The agathion can cast one cantrip that it knows.

legendary.name: Cast an Innate Spell
entries: The agathion can cast one of the spells it knows through its Innate Spellcasting trait.

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries: The akvan's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save {@dc 22}, + {@hit 14} to hit with spell attacks). It can cast the following spells without material components:

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If the akvan fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Aura of Fear
entries: An unhealthy, jaundiced light radiates out from the akvan in a 10-foot radius. Any non-evil creature in this area must succeed on a {@dc 17} Wisdom saving throw or become {@condition paralyzed|PHB} with dread for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If the creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the akvan's Aura of Fear for the next 24 hours.

trait.name: Shake Faith
entries: A creature that touches the akvan or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 10 ({@damage 3d6}) psychic damage and must succeed on a {@dc 17} Constitution saving throw or be {@condition blinded|PHB} until the end of their next turn.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The akvan makes four attacks: one with its bite, two with its claws, and one with its tail.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 16} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}23 ({@damage 3d8 + 10}) piercing damage. A target creature of Large size or smaller must succeed on a {@dc 20} Dexterity saving throw or be swallowed by the akvan. A swallowed creature is {@condition blinded|PHB} and {@condition restrained|PHB} and takes 28 ({@damage 8d6}) acid damage at the start of each of the akvan 's turns. The akvan can have up to two creatures swallowed at one time.

If the akvan takes 50 damage or more in a single turn from a creature it has swallowed, it must succeed on a {@dc 20} Constitution saving throw or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, who land {@condition prone|PHB} within 10 feet of the akvan. If the akvan dies, a swallowed creature is no longer {@condition restrained|PHB}, and can escape the corpse by spending 10 feet of movement, exiting {@condition prone|PHB}.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 16} to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. {@h}20 ({@damage 3d6 + 10}) slashing damage. The target is {@condition grappled|PHB} (escape {@dc 24}) if the akvan isn't already grappling a creature, and the target is {@condition restrained|PHB} until this grapple ends.

action.name: Tail
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 16} to hit, reach 30 ft., one target. {@h}26 ({@damage 3d10 + 10}) bludgeoning damage, and the target must succeed on a {@dc 20} Strength saving throw or be knocked {@condition prone|PHB}.

legendary.name: Move
entries: The akvan moves up to half its speed, using any movement mode it wishes.

legendary.name: Tail Attack
entries: The akvan makes a tail attack.

legendary.name: Furious Howl (Costs 3 actions)
entries: All creatures within a 60-foot cone that can hear the akvan must succeed on a {@dc 17} Constitution saving throw or take 21 ({@damage 6d6}) force damage and be {@condition stunned|PHB} until the end of the akvan's next turn. On a successful save, the target takes half the force damage and isn't {@condition stunned|PHB}.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Aldeth is a 12th-level spellcaster. Her spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save {@dc 16}, {@hit 8} to hit with spell attacks). She can cast the following spells:

trait.name: Aura of Despair
entries: Those that approach too close to Aldeth the Spider Queen are overwhelmed by feelings of despair. Any creature that starts its turn within 10 feet of Aldeth must succeed on a {@dc 16} Wisdom saving throw or be {@condition poisoned|PHB} until the start of its next turn. While {@condition poisoned|PHB} in this way, the target can take either an action or a bonus action on its turn, not both, and can't take reactions.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: Aldeth can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

trait.name: Web Sense
entries: While in contact with a web, Aldeth knows the exact location of any other creature in contact with the same web.

trait.name: Web Walker
entries: Aldeth ignores movement restrictions caused by webbing.

action.name: +2 Dagger
entries: {@atk mw,rw} {@hit 10} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d4 + 6}) piercing damage.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}9 ({@damage 2d4 + 4}) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a {@dc 14} Constitution saving throw, taking 18 ({@damage 4d8}) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

action.name: Web {@recharge 5}
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 8} to hit, range 30/60 ft., one target. {@h}The target is {@condition restrained|PHB} by webbing. As an action, the {@condition restrained|PHB} target can make a {@dc 16} Strength check, bursting the webbing on a success. The webbing can also be attacked and destroyed (AC 10; hp 15; vulnerability to fire damage; immunity to bludgeoning, poison, and psychic damage).

trait.name: Babble
entries: The allip incoherently mutters to itself, creating a hypnotic effect. All creatures within 30 ft. that aren't {@condition incapacitated|PHB} must succeed on a {@dc 11} Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, the creature becomes {@condition charmed|PHB} for the duration. While {@condition charmed|PHB} by this spell, the creature is {@condition incapacitated|PHB} and has a speed of 0. The effect ends for an affected creature if it takes any damage or if someone else uses an action to shake the creature out of its stupor.

trait.name: Madness
entries: Anyone targeting an allip with a spell or effect that would make direct contact with its tortured mind must succeed on a {@dc 11} Wisdom saving throw or take 7 ({@dice 2d6}) points of psychic damage.

action.name: Touch of Insanity
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 3} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}8 ({@damage 2d6 + 1}) psychic damage.

monster.name: Amalgamation

immune.note: from nonmagical weapons that aren't adamantine

languages: understands the languages of its creator but can't speak

trait.name: Immutable Form
entries: The amalgamation is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

trait.name: Item Use
entries: The amalgamation can use any of the items contained within its bulk. Items with limited uses, such as potions, scrolls, or wands, are expended normally.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The amalgamation has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Magic Weapons
entries: The amalgamation's weapon attacks are magical.

trait.name: Swarm Attack
entries: The amalgamation can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, damaging the creature with the flying weapons and objects composing its bulk. Any creature that starts their turn in the same space as the amalgamation must succeed on a {@dc 18} Dexterity saving throw or take 21 ({@damage 6d6}) slashing damage.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The amalgamation makes four melee attacks.

action.name: Sword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 11} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}17 ({@damage 2d10 + 6}) slashing damage.

action.name: Mace
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 11} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}15 ({@damage 2d8 + 6}) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 11} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}19 ({@damage 3d8 + 6}) bludgeoning damage.

trait.name: Split
entries: The amphisbaena functions normally even if cut in half. If dealt a critical hit with a slashing weapon, the creature is cut in half but continues to function as two separate creatures, each with half of the original amphisbaena's current hit points. The split amphisbaena can rejoin its two halves after completing a short or long rest. If one of the split creatures is slain, the amphisbaena can regrow the lost portion over the course of {@dice 1d4 + 2} weeks weeks.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The amphisbaena makes two bite attacks (one with each head).

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a {@dc 13} Constitution saving throw or become {@condition poisoned|PHB} for 1 hour.

immune.note: from nonmagical weapons

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Amurru is an 18th-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save {@dc 23}, {@hit 15} to hit with spell attacks). It can cast the following spells:

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: Amurru has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Polymath
entries: Amurru casts cleric, druid, and wizard spells at equal levels of power.

trait.name: Rejuvenation
entries: Amurru gains a new body in 24 hours if its heart is intact, regaining all its hit points and becoming active again. The new body appears within 5 feet of Amurru's heart.

trait.name: Ring of Protection
entries: Amurru has a +1 bonus to AC and saving throws while wearing the ring of protection.

action.name: Mace
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 12} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d6 + 6}) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Dreadful Glare
entries: Amurru targets one creature it can see within 60 feet of it. If the target can see Amurru, it must succeed on a {@dc 19} Wisdom saving throw against this magic or become {@condition frightened|PHB} until the end of the Amurru's next turn. If the target fails the saving throw by 5 or more, it is also {@condition paralyzed|PHB} for the same duration. A target that succeeds on the saving throw is immune to the Dreadful Glare from mummies of all types for the next 24 hours.

action.name: Teleport Other (1/Day)
entries: As an action, Amurru can teleport all creatures within 50 feet of it to a randomly determined location. A creature affected by the Amurru's Teleport Other must make a {@dc 19} Wisdom saving throw to avoid being teleported.

An affected creature is teleported to a random location within the complex (roll {@dice 1d6}: 1—3B-8; 2—3B-14; 3—3B-15; 4—3B-1; 5—middle of the maze to 3B-17; 6—3B-1). Roll randomly for each creature that fails its saving throw.
If a creature's saving throw is successful, the creature is immune to Amurru's Teleport Other ability for the next 24 hours.

legendary.name: Attack
entries: Amurru makes one melee attack or uses its Dreadful Glare.

legendary.name: Blinding Dust
entries: Blinding dust and sand swirls magically around Amurru. Each creature within 5 feet of Amurru must succeed on a {@dc 19} Constitution saving throw or be {@condition blinded|PHB} until the end of the creature's next turn.

legendary.name: Blasphemous Word (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: Amurru utters a blasphemous word. Each non-undead creature within 10 feet of Amurru that can hear the magical utterance must succeed on a {@dc 19} Constitution saving throw or be {@condition stunned|PHB} until the end of Amurru's next turn.

legendary.name: Channel Negative Energy (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: Amurru magically unleashes negative energy. Creatures within 60 feet of Amurru, including ones behind barriers and around corners, can't regain hit points until the end of Amurru's next turn.

legendary.name: Whirlwind of Sand (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: Amurru magically transforms into a whirlwind of sand, moves up to 60 feet, and reverts to its normal form. While in whirlwind form, Amurru is immune to all damage, and it can't be {@condition grappled|PHB}, {@condition petrified|PHB}, knocked {@condition prone|PHB}, {@condition restrained|PHB}, or {@condition stunned|PHB}. Equipment worn or carried by Amurru remains in its possession.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The giant carnivorous ape makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}15 ({@damage 2d8 + 6}) piercing damage.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}22 ({@damage 3d10 + 6}) slashing damage.

action.name: Rock
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 9} to hit, range 50/100 ft., one target. {@h}30 ({@damage 7d6 + 6}) bludgeoning damage.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The apprentice mage is a 1st-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save {@dc 12}, {@hit 4} to hit with spell attacks). It has the following wizard spells prepared:

action.name: Dagger
entries: {@atk mw,rw} {@hit 2} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. {@h}2 ({@damage 1d4}) piercing damage.

trait.name: Amorphous
entries: Pagonis can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

trait.name: Shadow Stealth
entries: While in dim light or darkness, Pagonis can take the Hide action as a bonus action.

trait.name: Sunlight Weakness
entries: While in sunlight, Pagonis has disadvantage on attack rolls, ability checks, and saving throws.

trait.name: Death God's Proxy
entries: The AC of Pagonis includes its Wisdom bonus. Undead creatures have disadvantage on attack rolls against Pagonis.

action.name: Strength Drain
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. {@h}32 ({@damage 9d6 + 1}) necrotic damage, and the target's Strength score is reduced by {@dice 1d8}. The target dies if this reduces its Strength to 0. Otherwise, the reduction lasts until the target finishes a short or long rest.
If a non-evil humanoid dies from this attack, a shadow rises from the  corpse {@dice 1d4} hours later.

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries: Ashfallen's spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save {@dc 23}, {@hit 15} to hit with spell attacks). Ashfallen can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Ashfallen is a 14th-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save {@dc 23}, {@hit 15} to hit with spell attacks). It can cast the following spells:

trait.name: Polyglot
entries: Ashfallen is fluent in all languages.

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: Ashfallen regains 10 hit points at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 hit point and its planar connection to its homeworld of Leng isn't interrupted. If its ability to plane shift (or other form of planar travel) is suppressed, this trait doesn't function at the start of Ashfallen's next turn.

trait.name: Rejuvenation
entries: If Ashfallen dies in a location not on its homeworld, it returns to life in {@dice 4d6} hours on its homeworld of Leng, regaining all its hit points and becoming active again.

trait.name: Sneak Attack (1/Turn)
entries: Ashfallen deals an extra 17 ({@damage 5d6}) damage when it hits a target with a weapon attack and has advantage on the attack roll, or when the target is within 5 feet of one of its allies that isn't incapacitated, and the Ashfallen doesn't have disadvantage on the attack roll.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Ashfallen makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 10} to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d6 + 5}) piercing damage and the target must succeed on a {@dc 15} Constitution saving throw or incur one level of {@condition exhaustion|PHB}.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 10} to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d8 + 5}) slashing damage.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The assassin vine can make two melee attacks: two slams or one slam and one constrict.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) bludgeoning damage. The target is {@condition grappled|PHB} (escape {@dc 15}) if the assassin vine isn't already grappling a creature. The {@condition grappled|PHB} target is {@condition restrained|PHB} until the grapple ends.

action.name: Constrict
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature {@condition grappled|PHB} by the assassin vine. {@h}18 ({@damage 3d8 + 5}) bludgeoning damage.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Auriferous is an 18th-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save {@dc 25}, {@hit 17} to hit with spell attacks). It can cast the following spells:

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If Auriferous fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: Auriferous regains 30 hit points at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 hit point and isn't in sunlight. If Auriferous takes radiant damage or damage from holy water, this trait doesn't function at the start of Auriferous's next turn.

trait.name: Soul Consumption
entries: When a creature dies within 30 feet of Auriferous, that creature must succeed on a {@dc 18} Wisdom saving throw or that creature's soul is torn from its body and pulled into Auriferous's gaping maw. Auriferous gains a number of temporary hit points equal to the dead creature's Hit Dice. Creatures that die in this manner can only be restored to life by a true resurrection or {@spell wish|PHB} spell.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Auriferous can use its Frightful Presence and make three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 18} to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. {@h}26 ({@damage 3d10 + 10}) piercing damage plus 21 ({@damage 6d6}) necrotic damage. The target's hit point maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the necrotic damage taken, and Auriferous regains hit points equal to that amount. The reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its hit point maximum to 0.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 18} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}23 ({@damage 3d8 + 10}) slashing damage. The target is {@condition grappled|PHB} (escape {@dc 24}) if Auriferous isn't already grappling a creature, and the target is {@condition restrained|PHB} until this grapple ends.

action.name: Tail
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 18} to hit, reach 20 ft., one target. {@h}19 ({@damage 2d8 + 10}) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Frightful Presence
entries: Each creature of the Auriferous's choice that is within 120 feet of the dragon and aware of it must succeed on a {@dc 24} Wisdom saving throw or become {@condition frightened|PHB} for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the Auriferous's Frightful Presence for the next 24 hours.

action.name: Change Shape
entries: Auriferous magically polymorphs into a humanoid or beast that has a challenge rating no higher than its own, or back into its true form. It reverts to its true form if it dies. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying is absorbed or borne by the new form (the dragon's choice).

In a new form, the dragon retains its alignment, hit points, Hit Dice, ability to speak, proficiencies, Legendary {@variantrule Resistance|PHB}, lair actions, and Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma scores, as well as this action. Its statistics and capabilities are otherwise replaced by those of the new form, except any class features or legendary actions of that form.

action.name: Breath Weapons {@recharge 5}
entries: Auriferous uses one of the following breath weapons.

action.name: Fire Breath
entries: Auriferous exhales fire in a 90-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a {@dc 24} Dexterity saving throw, taking 82 ({@damage 15d10}) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

action.name: Weakening Breath
entries: Auriferous exhales gas in a 90-foot cone. Each creature in that area must succeed on a {@dc 24} Strength saving throw or have disadvantage on Strength-based attack rolls, Strength checks, and Strength saving throws for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

legendary.name: Detect
entries: Auriferous makes a Wisdom ({@skill Perception|PHB}) check.

legendary.name: Tail Attack
entries: Auriferous makes a tail attack.

legendary.name: Wing Attack (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: Auriferous beats its wings. Each creature within 15 ft. of Auriferous must succeed on a {@dc 25} Dexterity saving throw or take 20 ({@damage 3d6 + 10}) bludgeoning damage and be knocked {@condition prone|PHB}. Auriferous can then fly up to half its flying speed.

immune.note: from nonmagical weapons

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries: Orcus's spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save {@dc 28}, {@hit 20} to hit with spell attacks). Orcus can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

trait.name: Aura of Death
entries: Each non-undead creature that starts its turn within 20 feet of Orcus takes 17 ({@damage 5d6}) necrotic damage.

trait.name: Wand of Orcus
entries: The wand has 20 charges, and any of its properties that require a saving throw have a save DC of 17. While holding it, Orcus can use an action to cast {@spell blight|PHB}, darkness, or speak with dead. Alternatively, he can expend 1 or more of the wand's charges to cast one of the following spells from it: {@spell bestow curse|PHB} (1 charge), {@spell contagion|PHB} (2 charges), or {@spell power word kill|PHB} (5 charges). The wand regains all charges daily at dawn.

While in his lair, Orcus can use the wand to summon an undead army that consists of: 10 skeletons, 5 zombies, 3 ghouls, 3 specters, 2 wights, 1 mummy These undead magically rise up from the ground or otherwise form in unoccupied spaces within 100 feet of Orcus and obey his commands until they are destroyed or until he dismisses them as an action. Orcus can only use the wand in this manner once every 24 hours.
The wand functions differently from this description for any creature other than Orcus.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If Orcus fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Lord of the Grave
entries: Orcus always casts {@spell animate dead|PHB} or create undead at maximum level and without any restrictions. Creatures created by these spells remain under his control indefinitely.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: Orcus has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Magic Weapons
entries: Orcus's attacks are magical.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Orcus makes two Wand of Orcus attacks.

action.name: Wand of Orcus
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 20} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}24 ({@damage 4d6 + 10}) bludgeoning damage and the target must succeed on a {@dc 17} Charisma saving throw or drop to 0 hit points. On a success, the target takes 21 ({@damage 6d6}) necrotic damage.

action.name: Tail
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 20} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}24 ({@damage 4d6 + 10}) piercing damage plus 22 ({@damage 4d10}) poison damage and the target must succeed on a {@dc 20} Strength check or be knocked {@condition prone|PHB}.

action.name: Aura of Enfeeblement {@recharge 5}
entries: Black beams of negative energy surround Orcus in a 20-foot radius centered on him. Each creature in this area must make a {@dc 24} Constitution saving throw. On a failure, the target deals only half damage with weapon attacks that use Strength for 1 minute. A weakened target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a target's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the target is immune to Orcus's Aura of Enfeeblement for the next 24 hours.

action.name: Teleport
entries: Orcus magically teleports, along with any equipment he is wearing or carrying, up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space he can see.

legendary.name: Tail
entries: Orcus makes one tail attack.

legendary.name: Devouring Darkness (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: Orcus chooses a point that he can see within 100 feet of him. A cloud of darkness erupts from that point and lasts for 1 minute. The area is heavily obscured and each creature in the area must make a {@dc 24} Constitution saving throw, taking 28 ({@damage 8d6}) necrotic damage on a failure, or half as much damage on a success.
Creatures slain by the devouring darkness rise as ghouls under the command of Orcus within {@dice 1d4} rounds.

legendary.name: Charnel Wind (Costs 3 Actions)
entries: A putrid, carrion wind erupts from Orcus in a 30-foot radius centered on him and lasts until the end of Orcus's next turn. All non-undead creatures within this area must succeed on a {@dc 24} Constitution saving throw against disease or be {@condition poisoned|PHB} until the end of Orcus's next turn. While {@condition poisoned|PHB} in this way, the creature can take either an action or a bonus action on its turn, not both, and it can't take reactions.
Lair Actions On {@variantrule Initiative|PHB} count 20 (losing initiative ties), Orcus can take a lair action to cause one of the following effects. He can't use the same effect two rounds in a row.

legendary.name: Bone Cage
entries: Orcus causes all bones within the lair to form tight cages around two creatures of his choice. The cages can be attacked and destroyed (AC 15; hp 30; vulnerability to bludgeoning damage; resistance to piercing, poison, slashing, and psychic damage). Until they are destroyed, creatures within the cages have a movement of 0.

legendary.name: Fountain of Blood
entries: Orcus chooses a point on the ground that he can see within 100 feet of him. A geyser of caustic blood erupts from the ground at that point and rains down in a 40-foot high, 10-foot cylinder. Each creature in that area must succeed on a {@dc 24} Dexterity saving throw, taking 24 ({@damage 7d6}) acid damage on a failure, or half as much damage on a success.

immune.note: from nonmagical weapons

entries: A putrid, carrion wind erupts from Orcus in a 30-foot radius centered on him and lasts until the end of Orcus's next turn. All non-undead creatures within this area must succeed on a {@dc 21} Constitution saving throw against disease or be {@condition poisoned|PHB} until the end of Orcus's next turn. While {@condition poisoned|PHB} in this way, the creature can take either an action or a bonus action on its turn, not both, and it can't take reactions.
Lair Actions On {@variantrule Initiative|PHB} count 20 (losing initiative ties), Orcus can take a lair action to cause one of the following effects. He can't use the same effect two rounds in a row.

legendary.name: Bone Cage
entries: Orcus causes all bones within the lair to form tight cages around two creatures of his choice. The cages can be attacked and destroyed (AC 15; hp 30; vulnerability to bludgeoning damage; resistance to piercing, poison, slashing, and psychic damage). Until they are destroyed, creatures within the cages have a movement of 0.

legendary.name: Fountain of Blood
entries: Orcus chooses a point on the ground that he can see within 100 feet of him. A geyser of caustic blood erupts from the ground at that point and rains down in a 40-foot high, 20-foot cylinder. Each creature in that area must succeed on a {@dc 21} Dexterity saving throw, taking 14 ({@damage 4d6}) acid damage on a failure, or half as much damage on a success.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Azraggad is an 11th-level spellcaster. His spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save {@dc 18}, {@hit 10} to hit with spell attacks). He can cast the following spells:

trait.name: Shapechanger
entries: If Azraggad isn't in sunlight or running water, he can use his action to polymorph into a Tiny bat or a Medium cloud of mist, or back into his true form.

While in bat form, Azraggad can't speak, his walking speed is 5 feet, and he has a flying speed of 30 feet. His statistics, other than his size and speed, are unchanged. Anything he is wearing transforms with him, but nothing he is carrying does. He reverts to his true form if he dies.

While in mist form, Azraggad can't take any actions, speak, or manipulate objects. He is weightless, has a flying speed of 20 feet, can hover, and can enter a hostile creature's space and stop there. In addition, if air can pass through a space, the mist can do so without squeezing, and he can't pass through water. He has advantage on Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution saving throws, and he is immune to all nonmagical damage, except the damage he takes from sunlight.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If Azraggad fails a saving throw, he can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Misty Escape
entries: When he drops to 0 hit points outside his resting place, Azraggad transforms into a cloud of mist (as in the Shapechanger trait) instead of falling {@condition unconscious|PHB}, provided that he isn't in sunlight or running water. If he can't transform, he is destroyed.

While he has 0 hit points in mist form, he can't revert to his vampire form, and he must reach his resting place within 2 hours or be destroyed. Once in his resting place, he reverts to his vampire form. He is then {@condition paralyzed|PHB} until he regains at least 1 hit point. After spending 1 hour in his resting place with 0 hit points, he regains 1 hit point.

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: Azraggad regains 20 hit points at the start of his turn if he has at least 1 hit point and isn't in sunlight or running water. If he takes radiant damage or damage from holy water, this trait doesn't function at the start of his next turn.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: Azraggad can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

trait.name: Vampire Weaknesses
entries: Azraggad has the following flaws:

items.name: Forbiddance
entries: Azraggad can't enter a residence without an invitation from one of the occupants.

items.name: Harmed by Running Water
entries: Azraggad takes 20 acid damage if he ends his turn in running water.

items.name: Stake to the Heart
entries: If a piercing weapon made of wood is driven into Azraggad's heart while he is {@condition incapacitated|PHB} in his resting place, Azraggad is {@condition paralyzed|PHB} until the stake is removed.

items.name: Sunlight Hypersensitivity
entries: Azraggad takes 20 radiant damage when he starts his turn in sunlight. While in sunlight, he has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.

action.name: Multiattack (Vampire Form Only)
entries: Azraggad makes two attacks, only one of which can be a bite attack.

action.name: Unarmed Strike (Vampire Form Only)
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) bludgeoning damage. Instead of dealing damage, Azraggad can grapple the target (escape {@dc 18}).

action.name: Bite (Bat or Vampire Form Only)
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft., one willing creature that is {@condition grappled|PHB} by Azraggad, {@condition incapacitated|PHB}, or {@condition restrained|PHB}. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d6 + 4}) piercing damage plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) necrotic damage. The target's hit point maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the necrotic damage taken, and Azraggad regains hit points equal to that amount. The reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its hit point maximum to 0. A humanoid slain in this way and then buried in the ground rises the following night as a vampire spawn under Azraggad's control.

action.name: Charm
entries: Azraggad targets one humanoid it can see within 30 feet of it. If the target can see Azraggad, the target must succeed on a {@dc 17} Wisdom saving throw against this magic or be {@condition charmed|PHB} by him. The {@condition charmed|PHB} target regards Azraggad as a trusted friend to be heeded and protected. Although the target isn't under Azraggad's control, it takes the vampire's requests or actions in the most favorable way it can, and it is a willing target for Azraggad's bite attack. Each time Azraggad or his companions do anything harmful to the target, it can repeat the saving throw, ending the effect on itself on a success. Otherwise, the effect lasts 24 hours or until Azraggad is destroyed, is on a different plane of existence than the target, or takes a bonus action to end the effect.

action.name: Children of the Night (1/Day)
entries: Azraggad magically calls {@dice 2d4} swarms of bats or rats, provided that the sun isn't up. While outdoors, Azraggad can call {@dice 3d6} wolves instead. The called creatures arrive in {@dice 1d4} rounds, acting as allies of the vampire and obeying his spoken commands. The beasts remain for 1 hour, until Azraggad dies, or until he dismisses them as a bonus action.

legendary.name: Move
entries: Azraggad moves up to his speed without provoking opportunity attacks.

legendary.name: Unarmed Strike
entries: Azraggad makes one unarmed strike.

legendary.name: Bite (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: Azraggad makes one bite attack.

trait.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The band lord has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the bandit lord's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn't {@condition incapacitated|PHB}.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: A bandit lord makes three melee or ranged attacks.

action.name: Greatsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) slashing damage.

action.name: Dagger
entries: {@atk mw,rw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d4 + 3}) piercing damage.

action.name: Leadership (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: For 1 minute, the bandit lord can utter a special command or warning whenever a nonhostile creature that it can see within 30 feet of it makes an attack roll or a saving throw. The creature can add a {@dice d4} to its roll provided it can hear and understand the bandit lord. A creature can benefit from only one Leadership die at a time. This effect ends if the bandit lord is {@condition incapacitated|PHB}.

trait.name: Incorporeal Movement
entries: The banshee can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

trait.name: Life Sense
entries: The banshee can innately sense all living creatures within a 5-mile radius of it.

action.name: Chilling Touch
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) necrotic damage and the target must succeed on a {@dc 13} Dexterity saving throw or be knocked {@condition prone|PHB}.

action.name: Horrifying Visage
entries: Each non-undead creature within 60 feet of the banshee that can see it must succeed on a {@dc 15} Wisdom saving throw or be {@condition frightened|PHB} for 1 minute. A {@condition frightened|PHB} target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the {@condition frightened|PHB} condition on itself on a success. If a target's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the target is immune to this banshee's Horrifying Visage for the next 24 hours.

action.name: Keening Wail (1/Day)
entries: The banshee releases a terrible, keening wail, provided that it isn't in sunlight. This wail has no effect on constructs and undead. All other creatures within 60 feet of the banshee that can hear it must make a {@dc 15} Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature drops to 0 hit points. On a success, a creature takes 21 ({@damage 6d6}) psychic damage.

trait.name: Wounding Gaze
entries: If a target starts its turn within 30 feet of the basilisk and the two of them can see each other, the basilisk can force the target to make a {@dc 12} Constitution saving throw if the basilisk isn't {@condition incapacitated|PHB}. On a failed save, the target takes 7 ({@damage 2d6}) necrotic damage as blood weeps from the victim's eyes, ears, nose, and mouth. It must repeat the saving throw at the end of its next turn. On a success, the effect ends. On a failure, the target takes an additional 7 ({@damage 2d6}) necrotic damage and will continue to take recurring damage at the end of each of its turns unless the basilisk is {@condition incapacitated|PHB} or the effect is ended by the {@spell greater restoration|PHB} spell or other magic.

A creature that isn't {@status surprised|PHB} can avert its eyes to avoid the saving throw at the start of its turn. If it does so, it can't see the creature until the start of its next turn, when it can avert its eyes again. If it looks at the basilisk in the meantime, it must immediately make the save.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) piercing damage and 7 ({@damage 2d6}) acid damage. Armor reduced to an AC of 10 or a shield that drops to a +0 bonus is destroyed.

trait.name: Yip
entries: Doombats constantly yip while in combat, and the noise interferes with the {@status Concentration|PHB} of those attempting to cast spells. All creatures within a 30-foot radius that are maintaining {@status Concentration|PHB} on a spell when the doombat yips must succeed on a {@dc 10} Constitution saving throw or lose {@status Concentration|PHB} on that spell.

Armor reduced to an AC of 10 or a shield that drops to +0 bonus is destroyed. A damaged shield or suit of armor can be repaired by a blacksmith.

If the saving throw fails, the target takes 22 ({@damage 4d10}) poison damage immediately and becomes {@condition poisoned|PHB} until the disease is cured. Every 24 hours that elapse, the creature must repeat the saving throw and reduce its hit point maximum by 5 ({@dice 1d10}) on a failure. This reduction lasts until the disease is cured. The creature dies if the disease reduces its hit point maximum to 0.

action.name: Claws

trait.name: Trample

On a failure, the creature can't take reactions until the start of its next turn and rolls a {@dice d8} to determine what it does during its turn. On a 1 to 4, the creature does nothing. On a 5 or 6, the creature takes no action or bonus action and uses all its movement to move in a randomly determined direction. On a 7 or 8, the creature makes a melee attack against a randomly determined creature within its reach or does nothing if it can't make such an attack.

A creature that isn't {@status surprised|PHB} can avert its eyes to avoid the saving throw at the start of its turn. If the creature does so, it can't see the beetlor until the start of its next turn, when it can avert its eyes again. If the creature looks at the beetlor in the meantime, it must immediately make the save.
