A creature that is slain by the bodak's Gaze rises as a bodak 24 hours later unless restored to life by magical means.

A creature that isn't {@status surprised|PHB} can avert its eyes to avoid the saving throw at the start of its turn. If it does so, it can't see the bodak until the start of its next turn, when it can avert its eyes again. If it looks at the bodak in the meantime, it must immediately make the save.

trait.name: Sunlight Antipathy
entries: The bodak takes 5 radiant damage when it starts its turn in sunlight. While in sunlight, it has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The bodak can use its Scornful Glare and makes two slam attacks.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) bludgeoning damage and 13 ({@damage 3d8}) necrotic damage.

action.name: Caress of Orcus (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}17 ({@damage 3d8 + 4}) necrotic damage, and the target's Strength score is reduced by {@dice 1d6}. The target dies if this reduces its Strength to 0. Otherwise, the reduction lasts until the target finishes a short or long rest.

action.name: Scornful Glare {@recharge 4}
entries: The bodak targets one creature it can see within 60 feet of it. If the target can see the bodak, it must attempt a {@dc 12} Wisdom saving throw. The creature takes 22 ({@damage 4d10}) necrotic damage and is {@condition frightened|PHB} for 1 minute on a failed save. On a successful save, the creature takes half as much damage and is not {@condition frightened|PHB}.

immune.note: from nonmagical weapons

trait.name: Spiked Bone Armor
entries: The bone crawler is encased in a shell of ironhard bones that can absorb 150 hit points worth of damage. Against area of effect attacks, the bone crawler's bone armor will still take damage regardless of whether the bone crawler succeeded on the save. If the bone crawler succeeds on the save, the armor takes half the total damage dealt by the attack. If the bone crawler fails its saving throw, the armor takes double damage from the area effect.

For every 10 hit points of damage the armor takes, the armor gains an additional bone spike. A creature that starts its turn within 5 ft. of the bone crawler takes damage due to the bone spikes. For every bone spike the armor has accumulated, the adjacent creatures take {@damage 1d4} piercing damage.

The bone crawler can repair its armor over a 24 hour period by absorbing additional bones into its hulking mass. As the bone crawler absorbs bones, it secretes a substance that will harden, coating the bones, and create the iron-hard shell. For every 3 hit points of bone absorbed by the crawler, 1 hit point of damage is repaired on the armor. For example, if the crawler absorbs the skeleton of a creature that had 75 hit points it would repair 25 hit points of damage on its armor.

trait.name: False Appearance
entries: While motionless, a bone crawler is indistinguishable from a mound of bones.

trait.name: Improved Critical
entries: The bone crawler's bone blade attacks score a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The crawler can make up to 6 attacks using its bone blades and bone whips.

action.name: Bone Blade
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 11} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}11 ({@damage 1d10 + 6}) slashing damage.

action.name: Bone Whip
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 11} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d6 + 6}) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Whirling Frenzy {@recharge 5}
entries: The bone crawler spins its bone blades in a swirling storm of sharpened edges. Creatures within 10 feet of the crawler must succeed on a {@dc 15} Dexterity saving throw, taking 15 ({@damage 2d8 + 6}) slashing damage on a failure, or half as much damage on a successful one.

monster.name: Bone Reaper Reflection

immune.note: from nonmagical weapons

languages: understands Abyssal and Infernal but can't speak

trait.name: Fire Absorption
entries: Whenever the reflection is subjected to fire damage, it takes no damage and instead gains a number of hit points equal to the fire damage dealt.

trait.name: Immutable Form
entries: The bone reaper reflection is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

trait.name: Lightning Disruption
entries: If the bone reaper reflection takes lightning damage, the bone reaper reflection is slowed until the end of its next turn.
While slowed, the reflection can only move at half speed, cannot take reactions, and can only make one Claw attack on its turn.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The bone reaper reflection has advantage on saving throws against spells or other magical effects.

trait.name: Magic Weapons
entries: The bone reaper reflection's weapon attacks are magical.

trait.name: Reflection
entries: The bone reaper reflection is only visible through mirrors, and can only be directly attacked by viewing its reflection and striking blindly at where it would be from that view. Attack rolls against the bone reaper reflection have disadvantage. True seeing or see invisibility has no effect on the reflection's visibility.

The reflection's anchor is the statue, of which the monster attacking is merely a reflection. {@variantrule Damage|PHB} dealt to the statue is inflicted on the bone reaper reflection, and vice versa. If there are no reflective surfaces within 60 feet of a given target creature, or if the creature does not give off a reflection either naturally or magically, the bone reaper reflection cannot make attacks against that creature.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The bone reaper reflection makes two claw attacks.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 10} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}28 ({@damage 4d10 + 6}) slashing damage.

monster.name: Bone Warrior
languages: understands all languages it knew in life but can't speak

trait.name: Deathless
entries: A slain bone warrior reforms and animates 1 hour after being slain. Only a {@spell disintegrate|PHB} spell or equivalent destructive force can completely destroy a bone warrior.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The bone warrior makes two attacks: one with its longsword or battleaxe and one shield bash.

action.name: Longsword or Battleaxe
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) slashing damage, or 7 ({@damage 1d10 + 2}) slashing damage if used with two hands.

action.name: Shield Bash
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d4 + 2}) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it must succeed on a {@dc 12} Strength saving throw or be knocked {@condition prone|PHB}.

trait.name: All Around Vision
entries: A bonesucker can see in all directions at once and cannot be {@status surprised|PHB}.

trait.name: Magic Weapons
entries: The bonesucker's weapon attacks are magical.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The bonesucker makes four melee attacks.

action.name: Tentacles
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}14 ({@damage 4d4 + 4}) bludgeoning damage. The target is {@condition grappled|PHB} (escape {@dc 14}) if the bonesucker isn't already grappling a creature, and the target is {@condition restrained|PHB} until the grapple ends.

action.name: Liquify Bones
entries: If the bonesucker is grappling a creature at the start of its turn, it can feed on the creature. The {@condition grappled|PHB} creature's Strength score is reduced by {@dice 1d4}. The target dies if this reduces its Strength score to zero.
Otherwise, the reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest or lesser restoration or better is used on the target.

monster.name: Boris the Retriever

immune.note: from nonmagical weapons that aren't adamantine

languages: understands the languages of its creator but can't speak

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The retriever can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

trait.name: Web Sense
entries: While in contact with a web, the retriever knows the exact location of any other creature in contact with the same web.

trait.name: Web Walker
entries: The retriever ignores movement restrictions caused by webbing.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The retriever makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 10} to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d8 + 5}) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a {@dc 17} Constitution saving throw, taking 9 ({@damage 2d8}) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 10} to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. {@h}15 ({@damage 3d6 + 5}) slashing damage.

action.name: Eye Rays
entries: The retriever's eyes produce four different magical rays, each of which can only be used once every four rounds. The retriever can only fire a single ray each round, choosing one target it can see within 90 feet of it:

items.name: Cold Ray
entries: The targeted creature must succeed on a {@dc 15} Dexterity saving throw, taking 36 ({@damage 8d8}) cold damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one.

items.name: Fire Ray
entries: The targeted creature must succeed on a {@dc 15} Dexterity saving throw, taking 35 ({@damage 10d6}) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one.

items.name: Lightning Ray
entries: The targeted creature must succeed on a {@dc 15} Dexterity saving throw, taking 33 ({@damage 6d10}) lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one.

items.name: Petrification Ray
entries: The targeted creature must succeed on a {@dc 15} Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, the creature magically begins to turn to stone and is {@condition restrained|PHB}. It must repeat the saving throw at the end of its next turn. On a success, the effect ends. On a failure, the creature is {@condition petrified|PHB} until freed by the {@spell greater restoration|PHB} spell or other magic.

immune.note: from nonmagical weapons that aren't adamantine

trait.name: Fire Absorption
entries: Whenever the brass man is subjected to fire damage, it takes no damage and instead regains a number of hit points equal to the fire damage dealt.

trait.name: Immutable Form
entries: The brass man is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The brass man has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Magic Weapons
entries: The brass man's weapon attacks are magical.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The brass man makes one greatsword attack and one slam attack.

action.name: Greatsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}19 ({@damage 4d6 + 5}) slashing damage.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}18 ({@damage 3d8 + 5}) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Molten Breath {@recharge}
entries: The brass man exhales molten brass in a 25-foot line. Each creature in that area must make a {@dc 13} Dexterity saving throw, taking 28 ({@damage 8d6}) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one.

trait.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The brigand leader has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the brigand leader's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn't {@condition incapacitated|PHB}.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: A brigand leader makes three melee attacks: two with its rapier and one with its dagger.

action.name: Rapier
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) piercing damage.

action.name: Dagger
entries: {@atk mw,rw} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d4 + 2}) piercing damage.

action.name: Shortbow
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 4} to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) piercing damage.

reaction.name: Parry
entries: The brigand leader adds 3 to its AC against one melee attack that would hit it. To do so, the brigand leader must see the attacker and be wielding a melee weapon.

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries: The brigand sorcerer's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save {@dc 14}, + {@hit 16} to hit with spell attacks). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no components:

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The brigand sorcerer is a 9th-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save {@dc 14}, {@hit 6} to hit with spell attacks). It can cast the following spells:

trait.name: Verdant Bloodline
entries: The brigand sorcerer can innately cast druidic magic.

action.name: Quarterstaff
entries: Melee: {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d6 + 1}) bludgeoning damage, or 5 ({@damage 1d8 + 1}) bludgeoning damage if used with two hands.

action.name: Dagger
entries: Melee or ranged attack: {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d4 + 2}) piercing damage.

trait.name: Brute
entries: A melee weapon deals one extra die of its damage when Bugjuice hits with it (included in the attack).

trait.name: Reckless
entries: At the start of her turn, Bugjuice can gain advantage on all melee weapon attack rolls that turn, but attack rolls against her have advantage until the start of her next turn.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Bugjuice makes two greatsword attacks per turn.

action.name: Greatsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}15 ({@damage 3d6 + 5}) slashing damage.

action.name: Longbow
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 5} to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) piercing damage.

monster.name: Cadaver
languages: understands the languages it knew in life but can't speak

trait.name: Reanimation
entries: When reduced to 0 hit points, the cadaver falls inert and begins the process of reanimating. While in this state, the cadaver regenerates 1 hit point per round. Hit points lost to magical weapons or radiant damage are not regained during this process. When the creature reaches its full hit point total less any magical weapon or radiant damage, it rises, ready to fight again.
A fallen cadaver can be prevented from reanimating by salting and burning the bones, casting gentle repose on it, or bathing the bones in cleansing sacred flame.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The cadaver makes one bite attack and two claw attacks.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a {@dc 13} Constitution saving throw against disease or become {@condition poisoned|PHB} until the disease is cured. Every 24 hours that elapse, the target must repeat the saving throw, reducing its hit point maximum by 5 ({@dice 1d10}) on a failure.
The disease is cured on a success. The target dies if the disease reduces its hit point maximum to 0. This reduction to the target's hit point maximum lasts until the disease is cured.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) slashing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a {@dc 13} Constitution saving throw against disease or become {@condition poisoned|PHB} until the disease is cured. Every 24 hours that elapse, the target must repeat the saving throw, reducing its hit point maximum by 5 ({@dice 1d10}) on a failure. The disease is cured on a success. The target dies if the disease reduces its hit point maximum to 0. This reduction to the target's hit point maximum lasts until the disease is cured.

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries: The cadaver lord's spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save {@dc 14}, {@hit 6} to hit with spell attacks). The cadaver lord can innately cast each of the following spells 1/day, requiring no material components: darkness, fear, create undead.

trait.name: Create Cadaver
entries: A humanoid slain by a cadaver lord rises 24 hours later as a cadaver under the cadaver lord's control. The cadaver lord can have no more than three cadavers under its control at one time.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The cadaver lord has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Reanimation
entries: When reduced to 0 hit points, the cadaver falls inert and begins the process of reanimating. While in this state, the cadaver regenerates 1 hit point at the start of its turn. Hit points lost to magical weapons or radiant damage are not regained. When the creature reaches its full hit point total less any magical weapon or radiant damage suffered, it rises, ready to fight again.
A fallen cadaver can be prevented from reanimating by salting and burning the bones, casting gentle repose on it, or bathing the bones in cleansing sacred flame.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The cadaver lord makes one bite attack and two claw attacks.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a {@dc 13} Constitution saving throw against disease or become {@condition poisoned|PHB} until the disease is cured. Every 24 hours that elapse, the target must repeat the saving throw, reducing its hit point maximum by 5 ({@dice 1d10}) on a failure. The disease is cured on a success. The target dies if the disease reduces its hit point maximum to 0. This reduction to the target's hit point maximum lasts until the disease is cured.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d8 + 4}) slashing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a {@dc 13} Constitution saving throw against disease or become {@condition poisoned|PHB} until the disease is cured. Every 24 hours that elapse, the target must repeat the saving throw, reducing its hit point maximum by 5 ({@dice 1d10}) on a failure. The disease is cured on a success. The target dies if the disease reduces its hit point maximum to 0. This reduction to the target's hit point maximum lasts until the disease is cured.

trait.name: Brave
entries: The captain has advantage on all saving throws against fear.

trait.name: Leadership (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: For 1 minute, the captain can utter a special command or warning whenever a nonhostile creature that it can see within 30 feet of it makes an attack roll or a saving throw. The creature can add a {@dice d4} to its roll provided it can hear and understand the captain. A creature can benefit from only one Leadership die at a time. This effect ends if the captain is {@condition incapacitated|PHB}.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The captain makes three melee attacks.

action.name: Longsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) slashing damage, or 9 ({@dice 1d10 + 4}) if used with two hands.

action.name: Heavy Crossbow
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 2} to hit, range 100/400, one target. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d10}) piercing damage.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The carrion claw can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

trait.name: Magical Light Sensitivity
entries: While in magical light, the carrion claw has disadvantage on attack rolls, and opponents have advantage on attack rolls against it.

action.name: Appendix A:
entries: Multiattack. The carrion claw makes one bite attack and three claw attacks.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) piercing damage. If the target is a creature other than undead, it must succeed on a {@dc 14} Constitution saving throw or be {@condition paralyzed|PHB} for 1 minute. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}17 ({@damage 3d8 + 4}) slashing damage.

monster.name: Caryatid Column

resist.note: damage from nonmagical weapons that aren't adamantine

languages: understands the languages of its creator but can't speak

trait.name: Immutable Form
entries: The caryatid column is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The caryatid column has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Magic Weapons
entries: The caryatid column's weapon attacks are magical.

trait.name: Shatter Weapons
entries: Whenever a character strikes a caryatid column with a non-adamantine, nonmagical weapon, the character must succeed on a {@dc 14} Strength saving throw or the weapon shatters into pieces.

action.name: Longsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d10 + 3}) slashing damage.

trait.name: Keen Smell
entries: The cat has advantage on Wisdom ({@skill Perception|PHB}) checks that rely on smell.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}3 slashing damage. If the target is a creature other than an elf or undead, it must succeed on a {@dc 10} Constitution saving throw or be {@condition paralyzed|PHB} for 1 minute. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

trait.name: Crystalline Mandibles
entries: The caterprism's mandibles ignore resistance to slashing damage. In addition, when the caterprism attacks a creature with at least one head with its bite attack and rolls a natural 20 on the attack roll, it cuts off one of the creature's heads. The creature dies if it cannot survive without the lost head. A creature is immune to this ability if it is immune to slashing damage, doesn't have or need a head, has legendary actions, or the GM decides that the creature is too big for the head to be cut off with this attack. Such a creature instead takes an extra 27 ({@damage 6d8}) slashing damage from the hit.

trait.name: Tunneler
entries: Caterprism can burrow through solid rock at 5 feet per round leaving a 5 foot-wide, 8-foot-high tunnel in its wake.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The caterprism makes one bite and two claw attacks.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) slashing damage. If the caterprism scores a critical hit, it rolls damage dice four times, instead of twice.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target {@h}16 ({@damage 2d10 + 5}) slashing damage.

action.name: Crystal Breath {@recharge 5}
entries: The caterprism spews forth a crystalline silk-like substance in a 30-foot cone that instantly hardens into razor sharp crystalline spears. Each creature in that area must make a {@dc 15} Dexterity saving throw, taking 28 ({@damage 8d6}) piercing damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

trait.name: Keen Smell
entries: The catoblepas has advantage on Wisdom ({@skill Perception|PHB}) checks that rely on smell.

trait.name: Stench
entries: Any creature other than a catoblepas that starts its turn within 10 feet of the catoblepas must succeed on a {@dc 16} Constitution saving throw or be {@condition poisoned|PHB} until the start of the creature's next turn. On a successful saving throw, the creature is immune to the stench of any catoblepas for 1 hour.

trait.name: Charge
entries: If the catoblepas moves at least 20 feet straight toward a target and then hits it with a gore attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 9 ({@damage 2d8}) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a {@dc 14} Strength saving throw or be pushed up to 10 feet away and knocked {@condition prone|PHB}.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The catoblepas makes three attacks: one with its hooves, one gore, and one with its tail.

action.name: Gore
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}18 ({@damage 3d8 + 5}) piercing damage.

action.name: Hooves
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) slashing damage.

action.name: Tail
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. {@h}21 ({@damage 5d6 + 4}) bludgeoning damage, and the target must succeed on a {@dc 14} Strength saving throw or be pushed 10 feet away from the catoblepas and knocked {@condition prone|PHB}.

action.name: Poison Breath {@recharge 5}
entries: The catoblepas exhales its horrid, stinking breath in a 60-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a {@dc 14} Constitution saving throw, taking 36 ({@damage 8d8}) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. If the saving throw fails by 5 or more, the target instead takes 63 ({@damage 14d8}) poison damage.
The target dies if reduced to 0 hit points by this breath.

action.name: Stench
entries: Any creature that starts its turn within 10 feet of the catoblepas must succeed on a {@dc 12} Constitution saving throw against poison. On a failed save, the creature spends its action that turn retching and reeling and is {@condition poisoned|PHB} until the start of its next turn. Creatures that don't need to breathe or are immune to poison automatically succeed on this saving throw. On a successful saving throw, the creature is immune to the catoblepas's stench for 24 hours.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The cave fisher makes two claw attacks.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atk m} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) slashing damage.

action.name: Filament
entries: {@atk r} {@hit 3} to hit, range 60 ft., one target. {@h}the target is {@condition restrained|PHB} by the filament and must succeed on a {@dc 13} Strength saving throw or be pulled up to 25 feet toward the cave fisher. As an action, the {@condition restrained|PHB} target can make a {@dc 13} Strength check, breaking free of the filament on a success. The filament can also be attacked and destroyed (AC 12; hp 5; immunity to bludgeoning, piercing, and psychic damage). A cave fisher can create a new filament in 1 minute, but can only have one active filament at a time.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Celleen is a 14th-level spellcaster. Her spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save {@dc 17}, {@hit 9} to hit with spell attacks). She can cast the following spells:

trait.name: Abyssal Blessing of Orcus
entries: Celleen gains 20 temporary hit points when she reduces a hostile creature that is not undead to 0 hit points.

trait.name: Unholy Strike
entries: Once on each of Celleen's turns when she hits a creature with a weapon attack, she can cause the attack to deal an extra 18 ({@damage 4d8}) necrotic damage to the target.

action.name: Frosty Mace
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d6 + 1}) bludgeoning damage and 3 ({@damage 1d6}) cold damage and target's speed is reduced by 10 ft. until the start of Celleen's next turn.

action.name: Caress of Orcus (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}20 ({@damage 4d8 + 2}) necrotic damage, and the target's Strength score is reduced by {@dice 1d8}. The target dies if this reduces its Strength to 0. Otherwise, the reduction lasts until the target finishes a short or long rest.

If a non-evil humanoid dies from this attack, a shadow rises from the corpse in 24 hours under the priest's control, unless the humanoid is restored to life or its body is destroyed. Celleen can have no more than four shadows under her control at one time.

trait.name: Amorphous
entries: The chaos beast can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

trait.name: Destabilize
entries: A creature that touches the chaos beast or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it must make a {@dc 15} Constitution saving throw or be {@condition poisoned|PHB} for 1 minute. A creature {@condition poisoned|PHB} in this way takes 21 ({@damage 6d6}) necrotic damage each turn that it fails on the saving throw, and the creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If the creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the chaos beast's Destabilize effect for the next 24 hours.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The chaos beast makes two claw attacks.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) slashing damage plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) necrotic damage. The creature must make a {@dc 15} Constitution saving throw or be affected by the Destabilize effect.

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries: The chaos wurm's spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save {@dc 20}, {@hit 12} to hit with spell attacks). The chaos wurm can innately cast the following spell, requiring no material components:

trait.name: Immutable Form
entries: The chaos wurm is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The chaos wurm has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Magic Weapons
entries: The chaos wurm's weapon attacks are magical.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The chaos wurm makes four attacks: one with its bite, two with its claws, and one with its tail.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 15} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}23 ({@damage 4d6 + 9}) piercing damage.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 15} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}18 ({@damage 2d8 + 9}) slashing damage.

action.name: Tail
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 15} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}25 ({@damage 3d10 + 9}) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Swirling Chaos {@recharge 5}
entries: The chaos wurm unleashes a wave of swirling chaos in a 60-foot cone that tears at reality, causing its victims blinding pain. Each creature in that area takes 45 ({@damage 10d8}) psychic damage, or half damage with a successful {@dc 18} Wisdom saving throw. Targets that fail this saving throw must also succeed on a {@dc 14} Constitution saving throw or be {@condition blinded|PHB} for {@dice 1d4} rounds.

action.name: Teleport
entries: The chaos wurm magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.

monster.name: Coffer Corpse
languages: understands the languages it knew in life but can't speak

trait.name: Deceitful Death
entries: When a coffer corpse is struck for 6 or more hit points of damage in a single round, it slumps to the ground, seemingly destroyed.

If it has a target in its Death Grip, it releases the hold when it falls. A {@dc 16} Wisdom ({@skill Perception|PHB}) check sees through the ruse. On its next turn, the coffer corpse rises again as if reanimated, triggering its fear ability.

trait.name: Fear
entries: A creature that witnesses a coffer corpse rise after it uses Deceitful Death must succeed on a {@dc 13} Wisdom saving throw or be {@condition frightened|PHB} for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If the creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the coffer corpse's {@spell Fear|PHB} for the next 24 hours.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) bludgeoning damage. The target is {@condition grappled|PHB} (escape {@dc 13}) if it is a Medium or smaller creature and the coffer corpse doesn't have another creature {@condition grappled|PHB}.

action.name: Death Grip
entries: The coffer corpse chokes the life from one {@condition grappled|PHB} creature. The creature takes 7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) bludgeoning damage and is {@condition grappled|PHB} and {@condition restrained|PHB}.

trait.name: Indomitable (1/Day)
entries: The commander rerolls a failed saving throw.

trait.name: Second Wind (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: As a bonus action, the commander can regain 10 hit points.

trait.name: Leadership (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: For 1 minute, the commander can utter a special command or warning whenever a nonhostile creature that it can see within 30 feet of it makes an attack roll or a saving throw. The creature can add a {@dice d4} to its roll provided it can hear and understand the commander. A creature can benefit from only one Leadership die at a time. This effect ends if the commander is {@condition incapacitated|PHB}.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The commander makes three melee attacks.

action.name: Longsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) slashing damage, or 9 ({@damage 1d10 + 4}) slashing damage if used with two hands.

action.name: Heavy Crossbow
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 4} to hit, range 100/400, one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d10 + 1}) piercing damage.

trait.name: Shapechanger
entries: Corrak can use its action to polymorph into a Small or Medium humanoid it has seen, or back into its true form. Its statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

trait.name: Ambusher
entries: In the first round of a combat, Corrak has advantage on attack rolls against any creature it has {@status surprised|PHB}.

trait.name: Cunning Action
entries: On each of its turns, Corrak can use a bonus action to take the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action.

trait.name: Sneak Attack
entries: Once per turn, Corrak deals an extra 14 ({@damage 4d6}) damage when it hits a target with a weapon attack and has advantage on the attack roll, or when the target is within 5 feet of an ally of Corrak that isn't {@condition incapacitated|PHB} and Corrak doesn't have disadvantage on the attack roll.

trait.name: Surprise Attack
entries: If Corrak surprises a creature and hits it with an attack during the first round of combat, the target takes an extra 10 ({@damage 3d6}) damage from the attack.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Corrak makes two attacks with its claws or two attacks with its rapier per turn.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d8 + 4}) slashing damage.

action.name: Rapier
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) piercing damage.

action.name: Light Crossbow
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 7} to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) piercing damage.

action.name: Read Thoughts
entries: Corrak magically reads the surface thoughts of one creature within 60 feet of it. The effect can penetrate barriers, but 3 feet of wood or dirt, 2 feet of stone, 2 inches of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks it.

While the target is in range, Corrak can continue reading its thoughts, as long as Corrak's {@status Concentration|PHB} isn't broken (as if {@status Concentration|PHB|Concentrating} on a spell). While reading the target's mind, Corrak has advantage on Wisdom ({@skill Insight|PHB}) and Charisma ({@skill Deception|PHB}, {@skill Intimidation|PHB}, and {@skill Persuasion|PHB}) checks against the target.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The giant crayfish can breathe air and water.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The giant crayfish makes two attacks with its pincers.

action.name: Pincers
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) slashing damage, and the target is {@condition grappled|PHB} (escape {@dc 13}). The crayfish has two claws, each of which can grapple only one target.

resist.note: from nonmagical weapons that aren't silvered

trait.name: Torpor
entries: After draining a creature's hit points to zero, the crimson death, sated from its feeding, moves at half its normal speed and performs Dexterity ({@skill Stealth|PHB}) checks at disadvantage (because it flushes crimson, hence the name). Attacks against the crimson death are made at advantage.
These effects last for one hour.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The crimson death makes two attacks with its tentacles.

action.name: Tentacles
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Engulf
entries: If one or more tentacles hit a target, the crimson death may use a bonus action to move into the same space as the target. Whenever the crimson death enters a creature's space, the creature must make a {@dc 15} Dexterity saving throw. On a successful save, the creature can choose to be pushed 5 feet or back or to the side of the crimson death. A creature that chooses not to be pushed suffers the consequences of a failed saving throw. On a failed save, the crimson death enters the creature's space and the creature takes 4 ({@dice 1d8}) bludgeoning and 4 ({@damage 1d8}) necrotic damage. The engulfed creature cannot breathe, is {@condition restrained|PHB}, and takes 22 ({@damage 5d8}) necrotic damage at the start of each of the crimson death's turns. When the crimson death moves, the creature moves with it. A crimson death can hold only one Large creature or up to four Medium or smaller creatures inside it at a time.

An engulfed creature can try to escape by taking an action to make a {@dc 15} Strength check. On a success, the creature escapes and enters an unoccupied space of its choice within 5 feet of the crimson death.

trait.name: Magic Weapons
entries: The crypt thing's weapon attacks are magical.
Appendix A:Actions

trait.name: Multiattack
entries: The crypt thing makes two attacks with its claws.

trait.name: Claws
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}13 ({@damage 3d6 + 3}) slashing damage and 10 ({@damage 3d6}) necrotic damage.

trait.name: Teleport Other (1/Day)
entries: As an action, the crypt thing can teleport all creatures within 50 feet of it to a randomly determined location. A creature affected by the crypt thing's Teleport Other must make a {@dc 15} Wisdom saving throw to avoid being teleported.
An affected creature is teleported in a random direction and a random distance ({@dice 1d10 x 100} feet) away from the crypt thing. Roll randomly for each creature that fails its saving throw.
If the affected creature would arrive in a place already occupied by an object or another creature, the affected creature takes 14 ({@damage 4d6}) force damage and is not teleported.

trait.name: Brutal Critical
entries: Daarog can roll one additional weapon damage die when determining the extra damage for a critical hit with a melee attack.

trait.name: Reckless
entries: At the start of his turn, Daarog can gain advantage on all melee weapon attack rolls that turn but attack rolls against him have advantage until the start of his next turn.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Daarog makes two attacks: one with his shortsword and one with his spear, or two with his longbow.

action.name: Shortsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d6 + 5}) piercing damage.

action.name: Spear
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d6 + 5}) piercing damage.

action.name: Longbow
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 3} to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d8 + 1}) piercing damage.

immune.note: from nonmagical weapons not made of adamantine

trait.name: Antimagic Susceptibility
entries: The dam-thing is incapacitated while in the area of an {@spell antimagic field|PHB}. If targeted by {@spell dispel magic|PHB}, the dam-thing must succeed on a Constitution saving throw against the caster's spell save DC or fall unconscious for 1 minute.

trait.name: False Appearance
entries: While it remains motionless, the dam-thing is indistinguishable from what it is built to resemble, a dam that holds back a small amount of water.

trait.name: Immutable Form
entries: The dam-thing is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

trait.name: Sleep Vulnerability
entries: Built into the construct is a susceptibility to the {@spell sleep|PHB} spell. If the dam-thing is subjected to the effects of a {@spell sleep|PHB} spell, it is automatically affected by the spell, regardless of the amount of hit points the dam-thing still has.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. {@h}18 ({@damage 4d6 + 4}) piercing damage. If the attack hits, the dam-thing can use a bonus action to Constrict the target.

action.name: Constrict
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. {@h}22 ({@damage 4d8 + 4}) bludgeoning damage, and the target is {@condition grappled|PHB} (escape DC16). Until this grapple ends, the creature is {@condition restrained|PHB}, and the construct can't constrict another target.

trait.name: Incorporeal Movement
entries: Death can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

trait.name: Inevitable
entries: Death always goes last in any combat round and always hits, regardless of the target.

action.name: Reaping
entries: Death touches one creature within 5 feet of it. If the creature is not undead or a construct, the target takes 21 ({@damage 6d6}) psychic damage and must make a {@dc 20} Constitution saving throw. On a failure, the creature's hit point maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the psychic damage taken. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its hit point maximum to 0.

action.name: The Sound of Inevitability (1/Day)
entries: Death comes for everyone within 30 feet of it. All creatures other than constructs and undead must succeed on a {@dc 20} Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature drops to 0 hit points. On a success, a creature takes 35 ({@damage 10d6}) psychic damage.

trait.name: Brachiation
entries: A decapus can move through trees at its base climb speed (30 feet per round) by using its tentacles to swing from tree to tree. Trees used by the decapus in this manner can be no further than 10 feet apart.

trait.name: Mimicry
entries: The decapus can mimic any sounds it has heard, including voices. A creature that hears the sounds can tell they are imitations with a successful {@dc 13} Wisdom ({@skill Insight|PHB}) check.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The decapus makes up to four tentacle attacks.

action.name: Tentacle
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}9 ({@damage 2d6 + 2}) bludgeoning damage. If the target is Medium or smaller, it is {@condition grappled|PHB} (escape {@dc 13}) and {@condition restrained|PHB} until the grapple ends. The decapus has many tentacles but can only grapple two targets at any given time.

trait.name: Hyper-Awareness
entries: The defender globe cannot be {@status surprised|PHB}.

trait.name: Flight
entries: The defender globe's ability to fly is magical in nature and does not work in areas where an antimagic effect is active.

action.name: Electrical Bolt
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 5} to hit, range 30/60 ft., one target. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) lightning damage.

immune.note: from nonmagical weapons

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The demilich is an 18th-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save {@dc 28}, {@hit 20} to hit with spell attacks). It has the following spells prepared:

trait.name: Annulment
entries: If the demilich is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a saving throw to take only half damage, it instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the saving throw, and only half damage if it fails.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If the demilich fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Turn Immunity
entries: The demilich is immune to effects that turn undead.

action.name: Drain Life
entries: Each non-undead creature within 10 feet of the demilich must make a {@dc 17} Constitution saving throw against this magic, taking 21 ({@damage 6d6}) necrotic damage on a failure, and the demilich regains hit points equal to the total dealt to all targets.

action.name: Soul Shatter {@recharge}
entries: The demilich emits a string of vile words of power. All creatures within 30 feet of the demilich that it can see must succeed on a {@dc 17} Constitution saving throw or drop to 0 hit points. On a successful save, the creature takes 22 ({@damage 4d10}) psychic damage and is {@condition frightened|PHB} until the end of its next turn.

legendary.name: Flight
entries: The demilich can move up to its full movement speed and does not invoke opportunity attacks while doing so.

legendary.name: Bone Dust
entries: Blinding bone dust swirls magically around the demilich. Each creature within 5 feet of the demilich must succeed on a {@dc 17} Constitution saving throw or be {@condition blinded|PHB} until the end of the creature's next turn.

legendary.name: Frightening Glare (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: The demilich targets one creature it can see within 60 feet of it. If the target can see the demilich, it must succeed on a {@dc 17} Wisdom saving throw against this magic or become {@condition frightened|PHB} until the end of the the demilich's next turn. If the target fails the saving throw by 5 or more, it is also {@condition paralyzed|PHB} for the same duration. A target that succeeds on the saving throw is immune to the Dreadful Glare effect for the next 24 hours.

legendary.name: Profane Curse (Costs 3 Actions)
entries: The demilich targets one creature it can see within 30 feet of it. The target must succeed on a {@dc 17} Wisdom saving throw or be magically cursed. Until the curse ends, the target has disadvantage on ability checks, attack rolls, and saving throws. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the curse on a success.

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries: The baregara's spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save {@dc 15}, {@hit 7} to hit with spell attacks). The baregara can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The baregara has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Reckless
entries: At the start of its turn, the baregara can gain advantage on all melee weapon attack rolls it makes during that turn, but attack rolls against it have advantage until the start of its next turn.

trait.name: Running Leap
entries: The baregara's long jump is up to 40 feet and its high jump is up to 20 feet when it has a running start.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The baregara makes up to four attacks: one with its bite, two with its claws, and one gore attack.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 11} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}16 ({@damage 2d8 + 7}) piercing damage.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 11} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}18 ({@damage 2d10 + 7}) slashing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it is {@condition grappled|PHB} (escape {@dc 17}). The baregara can grapple one target at a time.

action.name: Gore
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 11} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}16 ({@damage 2d8 + 7}) piercing damage.

action.name: Teleport
entries: The baregara magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries: The demon's spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save {@dc 17}, {@hit 9} to hit with spell attacks). It can innately cast the following spells requiring no material components:

trait.name: Rampage
entries: When the Gharros reduces a creature to 0 hit points with a melee attack on its turn, the demon can take a bonus action to move up to half its speed and make a halberd attack.

trait.name: Improved Critical
entries: The demon's attacks score a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Gharros makes three attacks: one halberd attack and two sting attacks.

action.name: Halberd
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 13} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}19 ({@damage 2d10 + 8}) slashing damage.

action.name: Sting
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 13} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}17 ({@damage 2d8 + 8}) piercing damage, and the target must make a {@dc 18} Constitution saving throw, taking 17 ({@damage 5d6}) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting:
headerEntries: The pestilenzi demon's spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save {@dc 12}, {@hit 4} to hit with spell attacks). The demon can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

trait.name: Pestilenzi Rot
entries: The pestilenzi demon is suffused with rot and decay, its bite carrying horrid infections that prevent hit points from being regained while slowly withering the infected creature to a dried husk.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d6 + 4}) piercing damage and the creature must succeed on a {@dc 14} Constitution saving throw against disease or become {@condition poisoned|PHB} until the disease is cured and unable to regain hit points. Every 24 hours that elapse, the target must repeat the saving throw, reducing its hit point maximum by 5 ({@dice 1d10}) on a failure. The disease is cured on a success. The target dies if the disease reduces its hit point maximum to 0. This reduction to the target's hit point maximum and the inability to regain hit points lasts until the disease is cured.

action.name: Summon Demon (1/Day)
entries: The demon has a 20 percent chance of summoning {@dice 1d4} dretches or one pestilenzi demon.

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries: Maphistal's spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save {@dc 22}, {@hit 14} to hit with spell attacks). It can innately cast the following spells requiring no material components:

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If Maphistal fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: Maphistal has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Magic Weapon
entries: Maphistal's melee attacks are magical

trait.name: Rampage
entries: When Maphistal reduces a creature to 0 hit points with a melee attack on its turn, Maphistal can take a bonus action to move up to half its speed and make a bite attack.

trait.name: Unholy Aura
entries: Malevolent shadows swirl around Maphistal and radiate out from it in a 30-foot radius. Non-evil creatures in this area have disadvantage on attack rolls against Maphistal and its allies.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Maphistal makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 17} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}23 ({@damage 4d6 + 9}) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a {@dc 20} Constitution saving throw against disease or become {@condition poisoned|PHB} until the disease is cured. Every 24 hours that elapse, the target must repeat the saving throw, reducing its hit point maximum by 5 ({@dice 1d10}) on a failure. The disease is cured on a success. The target dies if the disease reduces its hit point maximum to 0. This reduction to the target's hit point maximum lasts until the disease is cured. The disease can be magically cured by a greater restoration or {@spell heal|PHB} spell.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 17} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}27 ({@damage 4d8 + 9}) slashing damage. If the target is a creature, it must make a {@dc 20} Constitution saving throw. On a failure, the target's Dexterity score is reduced by {@dice 1d4}. The target dies if this reduces its Dexterity to 0.
Otherwise, the reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest.

action.name: Teleport
entries: Maphistal magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.

legendary.name: Attack
entries: Maphistal makes one claw attack.

legendary.name: Circle of Death
entries: Maphistal casts {@spell circle of death|PHB}.

legendary.name: Teleport
entries: Maphistal uses its {@spell Teleport|PHB} action.

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries: The denizen of Leng's spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save {@dc 16}, {@hit 8} to hit with spell attacks). The denizen of Leng can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: The denizen of Leng regains 5 hit points at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 hit point and its planar connection to its homeworld of Leng isn't interrupted. If its ability to plane shift (or other form of planar travel) is suppressed, this trait doesn't function at the start of the denizen of Leng's next turn.

trait.name: Rejuvenation
entries: If the denizen of Leng dies in a location not on its homeworld, it returns to life in {@dice 4d6} hours on its homeworld of Leng, regaining all its hit points and becoming active again.

trait.name: Sneak Attack (1/Turn)
entries: The denizen of Leng deals an extra 17 ({@damage 5d6}) damage when it hits a target with a weapon attack and has advantage on the attack roll, or when the target is within 5 feet of one of its allies that isn't incapacitated and the denizen of Leng doesn't have disadvantage on the attack roll.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The denizen of Leng makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) piercing damage and the target must succeed on a {@dc 15} Constitution saving throw or incur one level of {@condition exhaustion|PHB}.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) slashing damage.

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries: The derro's spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save {@dc 13}, {@hit 5} to hit with spell attacks). The derro can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

trait.name: Insane
entries: The derro is immune to all spells and magical effects that impact the mind.

trait.name: Shadow Stealth
entries: While in dim light or darkness, the derro can take the Hide action as a bonus action.

trait.name: Sneak Attack (1/Turn)
entries: The derro deals an extra 7 ({@damage 2d6}) damage when it hits a target with a weapon attack and has advantage on the attack roll, or when the target is within 5 feet of one of the derro's allies that isn't incapacitated and the derro doesn't have disadvantage on the attack roll.

trait.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the derro has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom ({@skill Perception|PHB}) checks that rely on sight

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The derro makes two attacks with its shortsword.

action.name: Shortsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) piercing damage and 3 ({@damage 1d6}) poison damage.

action.name: Light Crossbow
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 4} to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) piercing damage.

immune.note: from nonmagical weapons

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Deserach is an 18th-level spellcaster. Her spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save {@dc 21}, {@hit 13} to hit with spell attacks). She can cast the following spells:

trait.name: Abyssal Blessing of Orcus
entries: The power of Orcus imbues Deserach with additional spell slots.

trait.name: Eschewal
entries: If Deserach is subjected to an effect that allows her to make a saving throw to take only half damage, she instead takes no damage if she succeeds on the saving throw, and only half damage if she fails.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: Deserach has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Turn Immunity
entries: Deserach is immune to effects that turn undead.

action.name: Devour Soul
entries: Each non-undead creature within 10 feet of Deserach must make a {@dc 17} Constitution saving throw against this magic, taking 14 ({@damage 4d6}) necrotic damage on a failure, and Deserach regains hit points equal to the total dealt to all targets.

action.name: Soul Shatter {@recharge}
entries: Deserach emits a string of vile words of power. All creatures within 30 feet of her that she can see must succeed on a {@dc 17} Constitution saving throw or drop to 0 hit points. On a successful save, the creature takes 33 ({@damage 6d10}) psychic damage and is {@condition frightened|PHB} until the end of its next turn.

legendary.name: Flight
entries: Deserach can move up to her full movement speed and does not invoke opportunity attacks while doing so.

legendary.name: Bone Dust
entries: Blinding bone dust swirls magically around Deserach. Each creature within 5 feet of her must succeed on a {@dc 17} Constitution saving throw or be {@condition blinded|PHB} until the end of the creature's next turn.

legendary.name: Cast Spell (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: Deserach casts a spell.

legendary.name: Curse of Corruption (Costs 3 Actions)
entries: Deserach targets one creature she can see within 30 feet of her. The target must succeed on a {@dc 17} Wisdom saving throw or be magically cursed. Until the curse ends, the target has disadvantage on attack rolls made against Deserach, and on saving throws and ability checks made with one ability score (GM choice). The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the curse on a success.

resist.note: from nonmagical weapons that aren't silvered

trait.name: Devil's Sight
entries: Magical darkness doesn't impede the devil's darkvision.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The devil has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Polyglot
entries: The devil is fluent in all languages.

trait.name: Tormentor
entries: The devil is extremely gifted in the methods of torture and causing excrutiating pain.

trait.name: Surgical Strikes
entries: The devil scores a critical hit on a roll of 18, 19, or 20.

Innate Spellcasting: The devil's spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save {@dc 20}, {@hit 12} to hit with spell attacks). The devil can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:
At will: acid splash, plane shift, shocking grasp, spare the dying
3/day each: cure wounds, greater restoration
1/day: revivify

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The devil makes three melee attacks.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 11} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}24 ({@damage 4d8 + 6}) slashing damage, and the target must succeed on a {@dc 18} Constitution saving throw or be {@condition incapacitated|PHB} by excruciating pain until the end of the devil's next turn.

action.name: Chain
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 11} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d6 + 6}) slashing damage. The target is {@condition grappled|PHB} (escape {@dc 18}) if the devil isn't already grappling a creature. Until this grapple ends, the target is {@condition restrained|PHB}, and must succeed on a {@dc 18} Constitution saving throw or be {@condition incapacitated|PHB} by excruciating pain, and the target takes 10 ({@damage 3d6}) piercing damage at the start of each of its turns.

action.name: Animate Chains (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: Up to four chains the devil can see within 60 feet of it magically sprout razor-edged barbs and animate under the devil's control, provided that the chains aren't being worn or carried.

Each animated chain is an object with AC 20, 20 hit points, resistance to piercing damage, and immunity to psychic and thunder damage. When the devil uses Multiattack on its turn, it can use each animated chain to make one additional chain attack. An animated chain can grapple one creature of its own but can't make attacks while grappling. An animated chain reverts to its inanimate state if reduced to 0 hit points or if the devil is {@condition incapacitated|PHB} or dies.

reaction.name: Unnerving Mask
entries: When a creature the devil can see starts its turn within 30 feet of the devil, the devil can create the illusion that it looks like one of the creature's departed loved ones or bitter enemies. If the creature can see the devil, it must succeed on a {@dc 18} Wisdom saving throw or be {@condition frightened|PHB} until the end of its turn.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The lilin is a 13th-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save {@dc 22}, {@hit 14} to hit with spell attacks). It can cast the following spells:

trait.name: Devil's Sight
entries: Magical darkness doesn't impede the devil's darkvision.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The devil has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The lilin makes two attacks with its claws.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 10} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) slashing damage.

action.name: Teleport
entries: The lilin magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting:
headerEntries: The devourer's spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save {@dc 18}, {@hit 10} to hit with spell attacks). The devourer can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

trait.name: Devour Soul
entries: When the devourer reduces a creature to 0 hit points, that creature must succeed on a {@dc 18} Wisdom saving throw or the devourer consumes the creature's soul. Creatures that die in this manner can only be restored to life by a true resurrection or {@spell wish|PHB} spell.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The devourer makes one bite attack and two attacks with its claws.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 13} to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. {@h}17 ({@damage 2d8 + 8}) piercing damage.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 13} to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. {@h}15 ({@damage 2d6 + 8}) slashing damage.

action.name: Torment Soul {@recharge}
entries: The devourer creates a howling whirlwind of necrotic energy in a 20-foot radius centered on itself. Each creature in that area that is not undead or a construct must succeed on a {@dc 18} Constitution saving throw, taking 55 ({@damage 10d10}) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

trait.name: Mist Form
entries: The devouring mist can occupy another creature's space and vice versa. In addition, if air can pass through a space, the mist can pass through it without squeezing. The mist moves through water as if it were difficult terrain. The mist can't use objects in any way that requires hands; it can apply simple force only.

trait.name: Blood Sense
entries: The devouring mist can sense living creatures that have blood or similar vital fluids in a radius of 60 feet.

trait.name: Sunlight Hypersensitivity
entries: The devouring mist takes 20 radiant damage when it starts its turn in sunlight. While in sunlight, the mist has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks

action.name: Blood Drain
entries: One creature other than a construct or undead that is in the devouring mist's space must make a {@dc 16} Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the target takes 28 ({@damage 8d6}) necrotic damage and its hit point maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the necrotic damage taken. In addition, the mist regains hit points equal to that amount. This reduction to the target's hit point maximum lasts until the target finishes a long rest. It dies if this effect reduces its hit point maximum to 0.

A humanoid slain by this attack rises 24 hours later as a zombie under the mist's control, unless the humanoid is restored to life or its body is destroyed. The mist can have no more than twelve zombies under its control at one time.

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries: The dragon's spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save {@dc 19}, {@hit 11} to hit with spell attacks). The dragon can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Living Shadow
entries: While in dim light or darkness, the dragon has resistance to damage that isn't force, psychic or radiant.

trait.name: Shadow Stealth
entries: While in dim light or darkness, the dragon can take the Hide action as a bonus action.

trait.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the dragon has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom ({@skill Perception|PHB}) checks that rely on sight.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The dragon can use its Frightful Presence and make three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 15} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}20 ({@damage 2d10 + 9}) piercing damage plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) necrotic damage.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 15} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}18 ({@damage 2d8 + 9}) slashing damage.

action.name: Tail
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 15} to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. {@h}22 ({@damage 3d8 + 9}) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Frightful Presence
entries: Each creature of the dragon's choice that is within 120 feet of the dragon and aware of it must succeed on a {@dc 19} Wisdom saving throw or become {@condition frightened|PHB} for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the dragon's Frightful Presence for the next 24 hours.

action.name: Shadow Breath {@recharge 5}
entries: The dragon exhales shadowy flames in a 60-foot cone. Each creature in the that area must make a {@dc 21} Dexterity saving throw, taking 63 ({@damage 18d6}) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. A humanoid reduced to 0 hit points by this damage dies, and an undead shadow rises from its corpse and act immediately after the dragon in the initiative count. The shadow is under the dragon's control.

legendary.name: Detect
entries: The dragon makes a Wisdom ({@skill Perception|PHB}) check.

legendary.name: Tail Attack
entries: The dragon makes a tail attack.

legendary.name: Wing Attack (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: The dragon beats its wings. Each creature within 10 feet of the dragon must succeed on a {@dc 22} Dexterity saving throw or take 15 ({@damage 2d6 + 8}) bludgeoning damage and be knocked {@condition prone|PHB}. The dragon can then fly up to half its flying speed.
