spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Drusilla is a 13th-level spellcaster. Her spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save {@dc 16}, {@hit 8} to hit with spell attacks). She has the following druid spells prepared:

action.name: +3 Club
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 10} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d6 + 6}) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Change Shape (2/Short or Long Rest)
entries: Drusilla magically polymorphs into a beast or elemental with a challenge rating of 6 or less and can remain in this form for up to 9 hours. Drusilla can choose whether her equipment falls to the ground, melds with her new form, or is worn by the new form.
Drusilla reverts to her true form if she dies or falls {@condition unconscious|PHB}. Drusilla can revert to her true form using a bonus action on her turn.

While in a new form, Drusilla retains her game statistics and ability to speak, but her AC, movement modes, Strength, and Dexterity are replaced by those of the new form, and she gains any special senses, proficiencies, traits, actions, and reactions (except class features, legendary actions, and lair actions) that the new form has but that she lacks. She can cast her spells with verbal or somatic components in her new form. The new form's attacks count as magical for the purpose of overcoming resistances and immunity to nonmagical attacks.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Dryot is a 6th-level spellcaster. His spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save {@dc 12}, {@hit 4} to hit with spell attacks). He has the following wizard spells prepared:

trait.name: Illusionist
entries: Dryot can cast the {@spell silent image|PHB} spell at will and can cast the {@spell mirror image|PHB} spell once without expending a spell slot. He regains the use of this ability when he takes a long rest.

action.name: Unarmed Strike
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 2} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}1 ({@damage 1d2}) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Quarterstaff
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 2} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}3 ({@damage 1d6}) bludgeoning damage, or 4 ({@damage 1d8}) bludgeoning damage if used with two hands.

resist.note: from nonmagical weapons that aren't silvered

trait.name: Incorporeal Movement
entries: Duke Aerim can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

trait.name: Rejuvenation
entries: Duke Aerim reforms within its lair {@dice 2d4} days after being slain, regaining all its hit points and becoming active again.

trait.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, Duke Aerim has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom ({@skill Perception|PHB}) checks that rely on sight.

trait.name: Sacrilegious Aura
entries: Duke Aerim exudes an aura of desecration out to a radius of 30 feet. Duke Aerim and any undead within the defiled area have advantage on saving throws against effects that turn undead.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Duke Aerim can use Malevolence or Limited Teleport and make one attack with Life Drain.

action.name: Life Drain
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}26 ({@damage 5d8 + 4}) necrotic damage. The target must succeed on a {@dc 16} Constitution saving throw or its hit point maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the damage taken. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its hit point maximum to 0.

action.name: Create Devouring Mist (3/Day)
entries: Duke Aerim coughs, expelling a devouring mist in an unoccupied space within 10 feet of it. The devouring mist is under Duke Aerim's control. Duke Aerim can have no more than three devouring mists under its control at one time.

action.name: Create Sword Wight
entries: Duke Aerim targets a humanoid within 10 feet of it that has been dead for no longer than 1 minute and died violently. The target rises as a sword wight in the space of its corpse or in the nearest unoccupied space. The sword wight is under the Duke Aerim's control. Duke Aerim can have no more than seven sword wights under its control at one time.

action.name: Malevolence {@recharge 5}
entries: The Bloodwraith has a limited ability to possess a creature that is in possession of any portion of its remains, any of the objects within its tomb, or any items that belonged to it in life and within 30 feet of it. A creature that meets these criteria must succeed on a {@dc 16} Charisma saving throw or be possessed by the Duke Aerim; Duke Aerim disappears and the target is {@condition incapacitated|PHB} and loses control of its body. Duke Aerim now controls the body but doesn't deprive the target of awareness. Duke Aerim can't be targeted by any attack, spell, or other effect, except ones that turn undead, and it retains its alignment, Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma, and immunities and resistances. Duke Aerim otherwise uses the possessed target's statistics, but doesn't gain access to the target's knowledge, class features, or proficiencies.

The possession lasts until the body drops to 0 hit points, Duke Aerim ends it as a bonus action, or Duke Aerim is turned or forced out by an effect like the {@spell dispel evil and good|PHB} spell. When the possession ends, Duke Aerim appears in an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the body. The target is immune to Duke Aerim's {@variantrule Possession|PHB} for 24 hours after succeeding on the saving throw or after the possession ends.

action.name: Limited Teleport
entries: Duke Aerim magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 150 feet to an unoccupied space it can see that is adjacent to its remains, an object from its lair, or an object that it possessed in life.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: Dungie has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Shapechanger
entries: Dungie can use its action to polymorph into an object or back into its true, amorphous form. Its statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

trait.name: Adhesive (Object Form Only)
entries: Dungie adheres to anything that touches it. A Huge or smaller creature adhered to Dungie is also {@condition grappled|PHB} by it (escape {@dc 16}). Ability checks made to escape this grapple have disadvantage.

trait.name: False Appearance (Object Form Only)
entries: While Dungie remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary object.

trait.name: Grappler
entries: Dungie has advantage on attack rolls against any creature {@condition grappled|PHB} by it.

trait.name: Rejuvenation
entries: If destroyed, Dungie gains a new body in 24 hours, regaining all its hit points and becoming active again. The new body appears in the room latrine in Rappan Athuk.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Dungie makes three attacks: two slams with its pseudopod and one with its bite.

action.name: Pseudopod
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d6 + 5}) bludgeoning damage. If the mimic is in object form, the target is subjected to its Adhesive trait.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) piercing damage plus 18 ({@damage 4d8}) acid damage.

action.name: Engulf
entries: Dungie moves up to its speed. While doing so, it can enter Large or smaller creatures' spaces. Whenever Dungie enters a creature's space, the creature must make a {@dc 16} Dexterity saving throw. On a successful save, the creature can choose to be pushed 5 feet back or to the side of Dungie. A creature that chooses not to be pushed suffers the consequences of a failed saving throw. On a failed save, Dungie enters the creature's space, and the creature takes 14 ({@damage 4d6}) acid damage and is engulfed. The engulfed creature can't breathe, is {@condition restrained|PHB}, and takes 21 ({@damage 6d6}) acid damage at the start of each of Dungie's turns. When Dungie moves, the engulfed creature moves with it.
An engulfed creature can try to escape by taking an action to make a {@dc 18} Strength check. On a success, the creature escapes and enters an unoccupied space of its choice within 5 feet of Dungie.

trait.name: Water Breathing
entries: The eel can only breathe underwater.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) piercing damage plus 9 ({@damage 2d8}) lightning damage.

trait.name: Keen Smell
entries: The eel has advantage on Wisdom ({@skill Perception|PHB}) checks that rely on smell.

trait.name: Water Breathing
entries: The eel can only breathe underwater.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}20 ({@damage 5d6 + 3}) piercing damage, and the target is {@condition grappled|PHB} (escape {@dc 13}).
Until this grapple ends, the eel can bite only the {@condition grappled|PHB} creature and has advantage on attack rolls to do so.

action.name: Swallow
entries: The eel makes one bite attack against a Medium or smaller target it is grappling. If the attack hits, the target is swallowed, and the grapple ends. The swallowed target is {@condition blinded|PHB} and {@condition restrained|PHB}, it has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the eel, and it takes 10 ({@damage 3d6}) acid damage at the start of each of the eel's turns. The eel can have only one target swallowed at a time.

If the eel takes 25 damage or more on a single turn from the creature inside of it, the eel must succeed on a {@dc 12} Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate the swallowed creature, which falls {@condition prone|PHB} in a space within 10 feet of the eel. If the eel dies, a swallowed creature is no longer {@condition restrained|PHB} by it and can escape from the corpse using 15 feet of movement, exiting {@condition prone|PHB}.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The elf is a 5th-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save {@dc 14}, {@hit 6} to hit with spell attacks). It can cast the following spells:

trait.name: Eldritch Arrow
entries: Once per turn, the eldritch archer can apply an eldritch effect to an arrow fired from its longbow. The eldritch effect does 4 ({@damage 1d8}) damage. The damage type can be either acid, cold, fire, lightning, or poison.

trait.name: Fey Ancestry
entries: The elf has advantage on saving throws against being {@condition charmed|PHB}, and magic can't put the elf to sleep.

trait.name: Keen Hearing and Sight
entries: The elf has advantage on Wisdom ({@skill Perception|PHB}) checks related to hearing or sight.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The eldritch archer makes two melee or three ranged attacks.

action.name: Rapier
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d8 + 5}) piercing damage.

action.name: +2 Longbow
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 10} to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. {@h}11 ({@damage 1d8 + 7}) piercing damage.

trait.name: Cell Death
entries: Damage dealt by the elemental can only be healed magically. In addition, a creature that is slain by a time elemental can only be restored to life by a {@spell true resurrection|PHB} or {@spell wish|PHB} spell.

trait.name: Foresight
entries: A time elemental can see a few seconds into the future. This ability prevents it from being {@status surprised|PHB}.

trait.name: Immunity to Temporal Magic
entries: Time elementals are immune to all timerelated spells and effects that are not cast by other time elementals.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The time elemental makes two slam attacks.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Multi-Manifestation {@recharge 5}
entries: The time elemental summons {@dice 1d4} duplicate manifestations of itself from alternate dimensions. Each of these manifestations has the same statistics of the time elemental but can only use melee attacks. Attacks that deal damage to one manifestation deal the same damage to the elemental and the other manifestations. The manifestations can attack on the turn they are summoned, and attack on the time elemental's initiative.
The elemental can have no more than four manifestations under its control at any time. The manifestations disappear at the start of the elemental's next turn.

action.name: Time Jaunt
entries: A time elemental can slip through the time stream and appear anywhere on the same plane of existence as if by teleport. This ability transports the time elemental and up to four other creatures of the elemental's choice that are within a 30 feet of it. Unwilling creatures must succeed on a {@dc 15} Wisdom saving throw to avoid being carried away.

The elemental can have no more than four manifestations under its control at any time. The manifestations disappear at the start of the elemental's next turn.

action.name: Temporal Displacement (1/Day)
entries: The time elemental can remove a target creature from the current timeline. The target must succeed on a {@dc 18} Constitution saving throw, or disappear in a flash of white energy.
For a number of minutes equal to the time elemental's Wisdom modifier, it is as if the displaced creature never existed. The creature is completely undetectable while in this state.
A displaced creature can us its action to attempt to end the displacement.
When it does so, it makes a {@dc 18} Intelligence check. If it succeeds, it escapes, and the effect ends.

When the effect ends, the creature reappears in the same space it was in before being displaced. If the space is occupied when the creature returns, it appears in the nearest open space and takes no damage.

When it does so, it makes a {@dc 18} Intelligence check. If it succeeds, it escapes, and the effect ends.

When the effect ends, the creature reappears in the same space it was in before being displaced. If the space is occupied when the creature returns, it appears in the nearest open space and takes no damage.

action.name: Time Jaunt
entries: A time elemental can slip through the time stream and appear anywhere on the same plane of existence as if by teleport. This ability transports the time elemental and up to four other creatures of the elemental's choice that are within a 30 feet of it. Unwilling creatures must succeed on a {@dc 18} Wisdom saving throw to avoid being carried away.

monster.name: Embodiments of the Eleven Profane Tides

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The embodiment has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Magic Weapons
entries: The embodiment's weapon attacks are magical.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The embodiment makes three longsword attacks.

action.name: Longsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d8 + 5}) slashing damage, or 10 ({@damage 1d10 + 5}) slashing damage if used with two hands.

trait.name: Alien Mind
entries: Encephalon gorgers can maintain {@status Concentration|PHB} on 3 simultaneous spell effects.

trait.name: Mindsense
entries: The encephalon gorger is aware of the presence of creatures within 300 feet of it that have an Intelligence of 3 or higher.

It knows the relative distance and direction of each creature, as well as the creature's approximate Intelligence score (within 3 points). Creatures under the effects of magic that protects the mind cannot be detected by the encephalon gorger.

trait.name: Mind Screen
entries: The mind of an encephalon gorger is an alien and dangerous place. Should a creature attempt to scan the mind or read the thoughts of an encephalon gorger (with detect thoughts, telepathy, or the like), it must succeed on a {@dc 15} Intelligence saving throw or be driven insane, gaining a flaw from the Indefinite Madness table (see the SRD). On a successful save, the creature is confused for 1 minute (as the {@spell confusion|PHB} spell).

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The encephalon gorger makes two attacks with its claws and uses Mindfeed if it has a creature {@condition grappled|PHB}.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) slashing damage If the target is Medium or smaller, it is {@condition grappled|PHB} (escape {@dc 16}). Until this grapple ends, the target is {@condition restrained|PHB}, and the encephalon gorger can only use its Mindfeed on the {@condition grappled|PHB} creature and has advantage on attack rolls to do so.

action.name: Mindfeed
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature that is {@condition grappled|PHB} by the encephalon gorger. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a {@dc 15} Intelligence saving throw, or take 33 ({@damage 6d10}) psychic damage, and the target's Intelligence score is reduced by {@dice 1d4}. The target dies if this reduces its Intelligence to 0. Otherwise, the reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest.

action.name: Adrenal Surge (2/Day)
entries: The encephalon gorger surges with adrenaline until the end of its turn. While under this effect, it gains a +2 bonus to its AC, it has advantage on Dexterity saving throws, and it gains an additional action on its turn (as the {@spell haste|PHB} spell).

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries: The eremite's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save {@dc 26}, {@hit 18} to hit with spell attacks). It can cast the following spells without material components.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If the eremite fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Graft Flesh
entries: As an action, the eremite can graft to its own body the viscera it harvests using its Evisceration ability. Doing so heals the eremite as if a {@spell heal|PHB} spell were cast on it.

trait.name: Painbringer
entries: The eremite's attacks inflict excruciating pain

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The eremite makes four attacks: one with its bite, two with its claws, and one with its wings.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 17} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}19 ({@damage 3d6 + 9}) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a {@dc 15} Constitution saving throw or be {@condition incapacitated|PHB} by excruciating pain until the end of the eremite's next turn.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 17} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}25 ({@damage 3d10 + 9}) slashing damage, and the target must succeed on a {@dc 15} Constitution saving throw or be {@condition incapacitated|PHB} by excruciating pain until the end of the eremite's next turn. The target is also {@condition grappled|PHB} (escape {@dc 23}). Until this grapple ends, the creature is {@condition restrained|PHB}, and the eremite can't grapple another target.

action.name: Wings
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 17} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}22 ({@damage 2d12 + 9}) bludgeoning damage, and the target must succeed on a {@dc 15} Constitution saving throw or be {@condition incapacitated|PHB} by excruciating pain until the end of the eremite's next turn.

action.name: Evisceration
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 17} to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature that is {@condition grappled|PHB} by the eremite. {@h}25 ({@damage 3d10 + 9}) slashing damage, and the target's Constitution score is reduced by {@dice 1d6}. The target dies if this reduces its Constitution to 0. Otherwise, the reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest.

The creature must also succeed on a {@dc 19} Constitution saving throw or be knocked {@condition unconscious|PHB} from excruciating pain as the eremite excises flesh or an internal organ from the creature.

action.name: Unnerving Gaze
entries: A creature of the eremite's choice that is within 60 feet of the eremite and aware of it must succeed on a {@dc 19} Wisdom saving throw or be {@condition paralyzed|PHB} for 1 minute. The {@condition paralyzed|PHB} creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. On a failure, the creature's Wisdom score is reduced by {@dice 1d4}. The target dies if this reduces its Wisdom to 0. Otherwise, the reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest.

action.name: Teleport
entries: The eremite magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.

legendary.name: Move
entries: The eremite moves up to its speed without provoking opportunity attacks.

legendary.name: Attack
entries: The eremite makes one bite attack or one wing attack.

legendary.name: Graft Flesh (Costs 3 Actions)
entries: The eremite uses its Graft Flesh ability.

trait.name: Superior Invisibility
entries: As a bonus action, the dragon can magically turn {@condition invisible|PHB} until its {@status Concentration|PHB} ends (as if {@status Concentration|PHB|Concentrating} on a spell). Any equipment the dragon wears or carries turns {@condition invisible|PHB} with it.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The dragon has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d2 + 3}) piercing damage.

action.name: Breath of Confusion {@recharge 5}
entries: The dragon exhales a puff of gas at one creature within 5 feet of it. The target must succeed on a {@dc 12} Wisdom saving throw, or for 1 minute, the target can't take reactions and must roll a {@dice d8} at the start of each of its turns to determine its behavior during the turn.

On a 1 to 4, the creature does nothing. On a 5 or 6, the creature takes no action or bonus action and uses all its movement to move in a randomly determined direction. On a 7 or 8, the creature makes a melee attack against a randomly determined creature within its reach or does nothing if it can't make such an attack. At the end of each of its turns, an affected target can make a Wisdom saving throw. If it succeeds, this effect ends for the target.

action.name: Ethereal Touch

action.name: Create Fear Guard

The target's spirit rises as a fear guard in the space of its corpse or in the nearest unoccupied space. The fear guard is under the fear guard's control.
The fear guard can have no more than two fear guards under its control at one time.

entries: The angel can change between winged celestial form, its original mortal form, and that of a Medium-sized eagle. Its statistics are the same in each form, with the exception of its attacks in eagle form.

trait.name: Ever Touching
entries: Fidele angels maintain awareness of their mate's disposition and health. {@variantrule Damage|PHB} taken by one is split evenly between both, with the original target of the attack taking the extra point when damage doesn't divide evenly. Any other baneful effect, such as ability damage, affects both equally.

trait.name: To My Lover's Side

trait.name: Unshakeable Fidelity
entries: Fidele angels are never voluntarily without their partners. No magical effect or power can cause a fidele angel to act against its mate, and no charm or domination effect can cause them to leave their side or to change their feelings of love and loyalty toward each other.

Any equipment she is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if she dies.

trait.name: Unholy Strike
entries: Once on each of the Gernalda's turns when she hit a creature with a weapon attack, she can cause the attack to deal an extra 18 ({@damage 4d8}) necrotic damage to the target.

trait.name: Unholy Weapon
entries: Orcus bolsters his follower's strikes in battle, imbuing their weapons with the ability to paralyze a foe (included in the attack). In the hands of any but a true follower of Orcus, an unholy weapon loses its power to paralyze a foe.

action.name: Unholy Flail
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) bludgeoning damage, or 7 ({@damage 1d10 + 2}) bludgeoning damage if used with two hands. If the target is a creature other than an elf or undead, it must succeed on a {@dc 10} Constitution saving throw or be {@condition paralyzed|PHB} for 1 minute. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

action.name: Caress of Orcus (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}17 ({@damage 3d8 + 4}) necrotic damage, and the target's Strength score is reduced by {@dice 1d6}. The target dies if this reduces its Strength to 0. Otherwise, the reduction lasts until the target finishes a short or long rest.

If a non-evil humanoid dies from this attack, a shadow rises from the corpse in 24 hours under Gernalda's control, unless the humanoid is restored to life or its body is destroyed. Gernalda can have no more than four shadows under her control at one time.

headerEntries: Igni is a 12th-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save {@dc 18}, {@hit 10} to hit with spell attacks). It can cast the following spells:

trait.name: Ethereal Sight
entries: The ghost can see 60 feet into the Ethereal Plane when it is on the Material Plane, and vice versa.

trait.name: Incorporeal Movement
entries: The ghost can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Igni makes two attacks with his spectral longsword and one spectral shield bash.

action.name: Spectral Longsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}22 ({@damage 4d8 + 4}) slashing damage plus 14 ({@damage 4d6}) necrotic damage.

action.name: Spectral Shield Bash
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}14 ({@damage 3d6 + 4}) bludgeoning damage plus 14 ({@damage 4d6}) necrotic damage.

action.name: Aura of Dread (Recharges after Short or Long Rest)
entries: Igni radiates an aura of unadulterated terror. Each enemy within 30 feet of the ghost must succeed on a {@dc 16} Wisdom saving throw or be {@condition frightened|PHB} for 1 minute. If a {@condition frightened|PHB} target ends its turn more than 30 feet away from Igni, the target can repeat the saving throw, ending the effect on itself with a success.

action.name: Etherealness
entries: Igni enters the Ethereal Plane from the Material Plane, or vice versa. It is visible on the Material Plane while it is in the Border Ethereal, and vice versa, yet it can't affect or be affected by anything on the other plane.

action.name: Horrifying Visage
entries: Each non-undead creature within 60 feet of the ghost that can see it must succeed on a {@dc 16} Wisdom saving throw or be {@condition frightened|PHB} for 1 minute. If the save fails by 5 or more, the target also ages {@dice 1d4 × 10} years.

A {@condition frightened|PHB} target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the {@condition frightened|PHB} condition on itself on a success. If a target's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the target is immune to this ghost's Horrifying Visage for the next 24 hours. The aging effect can be reversed with a {@spell greater restoration|PHB} spell, but only within 24 hours of it occurring.

action.name: Possession {@recharge}
entries: One humanoid that Igni can see within 5 feet of it must succeed on a {@dc 16} Charisma saving throw or be possessed by the ghost; Igni then disappears, and the target is {@condition incapacitated|PHB} and loses control of its body. Igni now controls the body but doesn't deprive the target of awareness. Igni can't be targeted by any attack, spell, or other effect, except ones that turn undead, and it retains its alignment, Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma, and immunity to being {@condition charmed|PHB} and {@condition frightened|PHB}. It otherwise uses the possessed target's statistics, but doesn't gain access to the target's knowledge, class features, or proficiencies.

The possession lasts until the body drops to 0 hit points, Igni ends it as a bonus action, or Igni is turned or forced out by an effect like the {@spell dispel evil and good|PHB} spell. When the possession ends, Igni reappears in an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the body. The target is immune to Igni's Possession for 24 hours after succeeding on the saving throw or after the possession ends.

entries: Creatures bitten by a giant tick must make a {@dc 15} Constitution saving throw or become infected with this disease. entries: The gibbering abomination can't be {@status surprised|PHB}.

trait.name: Pain Immunity
entries: The gibbering abomination is immune to any effect or condition caused as a result of extreme pain or agony. This ability does not protect it against damage the abomination would suffer.

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: The abomination regains 20 hit points at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 hit point. If the abomination has taken cold damage, this trait doesn't function at the start of the abomination's next turn.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The gibbering abomination makes up to three bite attacks, and uses Blood Drain on {@condition grappled|PHB} creatures.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}22 ({@damage 4d8 + 4}) piercing damage, and the target is {@condition grappled|PHB} (escape {@dc 14}), and it is {@condition restrained|PHB} until this grapple ends. While grappling the target, the abomination has advantage on attack rolls against it. The abomination can grapple up to three creatures.

action.name: Blood Drain
entries: Each creature that is not a construct or undead, and that is {@condition grappled|PHB} by the abomination must make a {@dc 18} Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the target takes 10 ({@damage 3d6}) necrotic damage, its hit point maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the necrotic damage taken, and the abomination regains hit points equal to that amount. This reduction to the target's hit point maximum lasts until the target finishes a long rest. It dies if this effect reduces its hit point maximum to 0.

action.name: Disruptive Cacophony {@recharge 5}
entries: The abomination emits a horrible quasi-arcane chanting that can disrupt spellcasters within 90 feet of it. Any creature attempting to cast a spell that can hear the abomination's Disruptive Cacophony must succeed on a {@dc 18} Constitution saving throw or the spell fails. The disruption lasts until the start of the abomination's next turn.

trait.name: Hyper-Awareness
entries: A lesser gibbering orb can see in all directions at once and cannot be {@status surprised|PHB}.

trait.name: Flyby
entries: The lesser gibbering orb doesn't provoke an opportunity attack when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

trait.name: Gibbering
entries: The lesser gibbering orb babbles incoherently while it can see any creature and isn't {@condition incapacitated|PHB}. Each creature that starts its turn within 20 feet of the orb and can hear the gibbering orb must succeed on a {@dc 16} Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, the creature can't take reactions until the start of its next turn and rolls a {@dice d8} to determine what it does during its turn. On a 1 to 4, the creature does nothing. On a 5 or 6, the creature takes no action or bonus action and uses all its movement to move in a randomly determined direction. On a 7 or 8, the creature makes a melee attack against a randomly determined creature within its reach or does nothing if it can't make such an attack.

trait.name: Esoteric Theft
entries: When a creature dies by being swallowed whole (or when a creature killed by the lesser gibbering orb in some other fashion is eaten by it), the lesser gibbering orb absorbs the creature's known spells, prepared spells, and innate magic abilities. The orb can use one of the absorbed abilities per turn as a bonus action. Each originates from an eye that is not producing an eye ray that round. Stolen spells and innate magic abilities are lost after 24 hours.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The lesser gibbering orb makes three bite attacks.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}21 ({@damage 4d8 + 3}) piercing damage. The target is {@condition grappled|PHB} (escape {@dc 13}) if the lesser gibbering orb isn't already grappling a creature, and the target is {@condition restrained|PHB} until the grapple ends.

action.name: Swallow
entries: The lesser gibbering orb makes one bite attack against a Medium or smaller target it is grappling. If the attack hits, the target is swallowed, and the grapple ends. The swallowed target is {@condition blinded|PHB} and {@condition restrained|PHB}, it has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the gibbering orb, and it takes 10 ({@damage 3d6}) acid damage at the start of each of the lesser gibbering orb's turns. The gibbering orb can have only one target swallowed at a time.

If the gibbering orb takes 30 damage or more on a single turn from the swallowed creature, the gibbering orb must succeed on a {@dc 13} Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate the creature, which falls {@condition prone|PHB} in a space within 10 feet of the orb. If the lesser gibbering orb dies, a swallowed creature is no longer {@condition restrained|PHB} by it and can escape from the corpse using 5 feet of movement, exiting {@condition prone|PHB}.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Gilth is a 11th-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save {@dc 17}, {@hit 9} to hit with spell attacks). It has the following spells prepared:

trait.name: Alien Mind
entries: Gilth can maintain {@status Concentration|PHB} on 3 simultaneous spell effects.

trait.name: Mindsense
entries: Gilth is aware of the presence of creatures within 60 feet of it that have an Intelligence of 4 or higher. It knows the relative distance and direction of each creature, as well as the creature's approximate Intelligence score (within 3 points). Creatures under the effects of magic that protects the mind cannot be detected by the encephalon gorger.

trait.name: Mind Screen
entries: The mind of Gilth is an alien and dangerous place.

Should a creature attempt to scan the mind or read its thoughts (with detect thoughts, telepathy, or the like), it must succeed on a {@dc 16} Intelligence saving throw or be driven insane, gaining a flaw from the Indefinite Madness table (see the fifth edition SRD). On a successful save, the creature is confused for 1 minute (as the {@spell confusion|PHB} spell).

trait.name: Abyssal Blessing of Orcus
entries: Gilth gains 10 temporary hit points when it reduces a hostile creature that is not undead to 0 hit points.

trait.name: Unholy Strike
entries: Once on each of Gilth's turns when it hits a creature with a melee attack, it can cause the attack to deal an extra 13 ({@damage 3d8}) necrotic damage to the target.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Gilth can use its Mindfeed and make two attacks with its claws.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) slashing damage. If the target is Medium or smaller, it is {@condition grappled|PHB} (escape {@dc 16}). Until this grapple ends, the target is {@condition restrained|PHB}, and Gilth can only use its Mindfeed on the {@condition grappled|PHB} creature and has advantage on attack rolls to do so.

action.name: Mindfeed
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature that is {@condition grappled|PHB} by the encephalon gorger. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a {@dc 16} Intelligence saving throw, taking 33 ({@damage 6d10}) psychic damage on a failed save, and the target's Intelligence score is reduced by {@dice 1d4}. The target dies if this reduces its Intelligence to 0.
Otherwise, the reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest.

action.name: Adrenal Surge (2/Day)
entries: Gilth surges with adrenaline until the end of its turn. While under this effect, it gains a +2 bonus to its AC, it has advantage on Dexterity saving throw, and it gains an additional action on its turn (as the {@spell haste|PHB} spell).

At will: charm person, suggestion
3/day each: darkness, detect magic, detect thoughts

trait.name: Mage's Evasion

headerEntries: The goblin priest of Orcus is a 10th-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save {@dc 16}, {@hit 8} to hit with spell attacks). It can cast the following spells:

trait.name: Abyssal Blessing of Orcus
entries: The goblin priest of Orcus gains 15 temporary hit points when it reduces a hostile creature that is not undead to 0 hit points.

trait.name: Nimble Escape

trait.name: Unholy Strike

trait.name: Unholy Weapon
entries: Orcus bolsters his follower's strikes in battle, imbuing their weapons with the ability to paralyze a foe (included in the attack). In the hands of any but a true follower of Orcus, an unholy weapon loses its power to paralyze a foe.

action.name: Unholy Mace
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 3} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}3 ({@damage 1d6}) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a creature other than an elf or undead, it must succeed on a {@dc 10} Constitution saving throw or be {@condition paralyzed|PHB} for 1 minute. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

action.name: Caress of Orcus (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)

If a non-evil humanoid dies from this attack, a shadow rises from the corpse in 24 hours under the priest's control, unless the humanoid is restored to life or its body is destroyed. The priest can have no more than four shadows under its control at one time.
